title: Online Reputation Management
description:
About Us



Mira Organics is a fast-growing health and wellness eCommerce brand. We went from zero to seven figures in just two months.



We sell a nerve relief lotion for people aged 50+ with neuropathy, and we regularly hear from customers whose lives have improved because of our product.



As we grow, we are seeing copycat stores, stolen content, and unauthorized sellers online. We need someone who can help protect our brand.



About the Role



Your job is to protect the Mira Organics brand online.



You will look for people using our brand, products, images, or content without permission and take action to remove them.



We will give you full authorization to act on our behalf, and you will manage this process independently.



What You’ll Do



Monitor platforms for copycats, fake stores, and stolen content, including:

, Instagram, TikTok, Google, YouTube, Reddit, Quora, Shopify, Alibaba, AliExpress, Fruugo, eBay, and similar sites

Do a light weekly check on Amazon and report anything suspicious

File DMCA takedown requests and report IP violations

Remove unauthorized product listings

Contact website owners and hosting providers when needed

Track all cases in a sheet

Share a short weekly report (what you found, actions taken, and pending items)



What We’re Looking For



Experience with DMCA claims and takedown processes

Understanding of how copycat stores work

Strong written English skills

Able to work independently and take ownership

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



This role is not for you if:



You have never filed a DMCA claim

You need step-by-step guidance

You are not comfortable working without close supervision

How to Apply



Please include:



Your resume

2–3 examples of takedowns or brand protection work you’ve done (include platform, issue, and result)

title: Experience Email Marketer
description:
ABOUT DISPENZA

Dispenza has quickly become one of the largest marketing agencies in the rapidly-growing emerging market of cannabis as it quickly legalizes state by state in the Americas. As the market matures, we are on a mission to help change how the market operates, leaving the more questionable activities done by current market leaders and emerge as the first marketing agency and platform that values our customers while simultaneously delivering business-changing results to our clients.



JOB OVERVIEW

We’re looking for an experience
 Marketer to support ongoing campaign execution, lifecycle marketing, and retention strategy. This role focuses on building and optimizing
 campaigns, automations, SMS, and Wallet/ePass messaging to drive engagement, retention, and revenue.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Plan, build, and execute
 marketing campaigns, including one-off broadcasts and automated lifecycle flows

- Develop and manage automations such as welcome series, abandoned cart, re-engagement, and retention sequences

- Segment audiences and implement targeted messaging strategies based on customer behavior and lifecycle stage

- Design and run A/B tests on subject lines, content, timing, and campaign structure to improve performance

- Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance (open rates, CTR, conversions, and revenue attribution)

- Translate performance data into actionable insights and optimization strategies

- Create clear, concise performance reports with recommendations for continuous improvement

- Support Wallet/ePass and SMS campaign initiatives as part of a broader retention strategy

- Ensure all campaigns are aligned with brand voice, compliance standards, and business goals



TEAM COLLABORATION

- Work closely with project managers, designers, and stakeholders to execute campaigns efficiently

- Participate in team reviews to evaluate performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Communicate updates proactively and flag blockers, risks, or optimization opportunities early



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 3–5 years of experience in
 marketing

- Hands-on experience with platforms such as Klaviyo, HubSpot, Mailchimp, or Salesforce

- Proven track record managing high-volume
 lists and driving measurable revenue impact

- Strong understanding of segmentation, lifecycle marketing, and customer journey mapping

- Experience building and optimizing high-performing campaigns and automations

- Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable strategies

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Strong communication skills with the ability to provide clear updates and ask thoughtful questions



DESIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- Experience with retention marketing in eCommerce or DTC brands

- Familiarity with SMS and/or Wallet (ePass) marketing campaigns

- Basic design awareness and experience working with templates or tools like Figma or Canva

- Experience in regulated industries (e.g., cannabis is a plus, but not required)



COMPENSATION

$500-$900 starting depending on experience.



SCHEDULE

- 8 hour shift, Tuesday to Saturday, 7:00am to 4:00pm Manila Time.

- Minimal overtime during weekdays and weekends will be expected as part of salary



Dispenza is proud to be an equal opportunity employer committed to a diverse and inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, wordpressage, marital status, disability, veteran status or any other basis protected by law.



HOW TO APPLY

Good luck!

description:

 Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



Are you a detail-oriented accounting professional looking to grow your career in a fast-paced, global work environment? Join our team as a Junior Accountant and work closely with our Accounting Manager to support accurate financial reporting, compliance, and continuous improvement across our finance operations.



About the Role



As a Junior Accountant, you will play a key role in maintaining financial accuracy, supporting audits, and ensuring timely accounting processes. This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working with numbers, deadlines, and structured systems—while working 100% remotely.

title: Video Editor
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

The Video Editor at Brands Capital Group is responsible for creating high-impact video advertisements and marketing content that drives campaign performance across digital platforms. This role combines technical editing expertise with creative execution — bringing Creative Strategist concepts to life through compelling visual storytelling that captures attention, drives conversions, and motivates action.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, data-driven environment, managing multiple projects simultaneously and optimizing content based on real performance data.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube & landing pages

Produce UGC-style content, product videos, and social media creatives

Use AI tools — AI voiceovers, talking avatars, automated captions, background removal

Collaborate with Creative Strategist team to execute campaign briefs and concepts

Repurpose existing content into multiple variations for A/B testing

Maintain consistent brand style and quality across all video assets

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines

Continuously optimize edits based on performance feedback and data



REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have 

AI Avatar experience — HeyGen, Synthesia, D-ID, Captions.ai, or similar

2–4 years of professional video editing experience (e-commerce / DTC preferred)

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Strong portfolio demonstrating performance-driven, conversion-focused video content



Preferred

Experience creating video ads specifically for Meta and TikTok platforms

Familiarity with AI video generation tools: Kling, Sora, Veo, ElevenLabs

Knowledge of hook-based editing and conversion storytelling

Understanding of DTC performance metrics: CTR, ROAS, retention rates

Background in direct response advertising or performance marketing

Experience working with Creative Strategists or in agency settings

Self-directed, remote-ready with strong communication skills



SKILLS & COMPETENCIES

Expert proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve)

Strong skills in Adobe After Effects for motion graphics and animations

Color grading, audio mixing, and sound design

Stock footage research, sourcing, and asset management

Platform optimization knowledge across Meta, TikTok, YouTube

Visual storytelling through editing pace, timing, and structure

Data interpretation for A/B testing and iterative improvement

Speed and efficiency across multiple concurrent projects



WHAT WE OFFER

Fully Remote

Work from anywhere in the world 

Competitive Salary

Compensation matched to your talent

Fast-Growing Brands

Work on exciting DTC e-commerce brands 

Creative Ownership

Real room for innovation & expression

Long-Term Growth

A role that grows as you grow

Agile Environment

Fast-paced, data-driven, impactful work





IDEAL CANDIDATE

The ideal Video Editor is a performance-focused creative professional who combines technical editing expertise with a deep understanding of what makes video ads drive conversions. They excel at bringing Creative Strategist concepts to life through compelling visual storytelling — skillfully sourcing, editing, and optimizing content for digital advertising platforms.

This individual is both creatively intuitive and analytically minded, thriving in fast-paced environments where they rapidly iterate and refine based on performance feedback. They take genuine pride in seeing their edited content generate ROI, grow leads, and contribute to campaign success — all while maintaining brand consistency and production excellence across every deliverable.



Ready to Apply?

We're actively reviewing applications — don't wait!

???? Apply:

title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
**********NOTE: Applicants who followed instructions below will be considered. We are hiring immediately.************



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: 50,000 PHP per month

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian E-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



10. Manage 12 Shopify Accounts



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses 

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include simple formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.



What We Offer: 

- 50,000 PHP per month

- Fully remote role | Stable working hours (8:00am – 4:00pm PH time)

- Long-term opportunity with a growing e-commerce business

- High level of trust, autonomy, and ownership

title: Junior or Senior Video Editor
description:
*** Please read through the entire post before applying.  Thanks! ***



*** Company Description ***

Engage Video Production (EVP) creates educational and communication focused video content, primarily for aerospace, defense, and technical clients. Our work helps high stakes organizations explain complex ideas clearly, train teams effectively, and communicate with absolute precision. We operate with a military grade standard of excellence and are looking for a Junior/Senior Video Editor who is ready to grow within a high accountability environment.



While aerospace and defense are our core specialties, our projects vary widely. We need an editor who is adaptable, technically proficient, and comfortable shifting styles to meet the specific goals of a diverse client base.



*** The Three Pillars of Success at EVP ***

To succeed here, you must embody these three core values:



Discipline: You follow through on every task without "floundering" or ghosting. You possess the self-discipline to manage your time and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



Motivation and Dedication: You are dedicated to the mission and the company's growth. You don't just "do a job"; you look for ways to contribute to the overall success of the team.



Radical Integrity and Accountability: You own your mistakes immediately. You have the backbone to point out errors for correction, even if they are your own, because you understand that precision is non-negotiable.





*** Role Overview *** 

We are seeking a Full-Time Video Editor to join our team. This is a stable, 40-hour-per-week role. You will be responsible for executing the editing of active projects under the guidance of our Creative Director.



The ideal candidate can work independently on assigned tasks, manage massive amounts of data, and communicate proactively. We are looking for a professional who takes pride in technical accuracy and understanding how a project’s storytelling can achieve success for our clients.





*** Core Responsibilities ***

Video Editing: Execute the editing process for short- and long-form video content from start to finish, ensuring high-quality storytelling and pacing for all client projects.



Media Management: Organize, sync, and manage large volumes of footage. You must be comfortable handling projects ranging from hundreds of gigabytes to multiple terabytes.



Technical Finishing: Perform professional color correction and grading on all deliverables. This includes managing RAW workflows and ensuring visual consistency.



Audio & Sound Design: Integrate music, perform basic audio cleanup/mixing, and ensure sound design aligns with the project’s goals.



Visual Polish: Apply motion graphics, titles, and lower thirds as required by the project scope to create a polished, professional product.



Feedback & Coordination: Implement revisions efficiently and meet agreed-upon deadlines. You will coordinate daily with the Creative Director and, when applicable, other freelancers or editors.





*** Required Qualifications ***

Professional Background: Demonstrated experience in video editing (freelance or agency). You should have a solid understanding of editing pacing, storytelling, and professional delivery formats.



Software Proficiency: High proficiency in DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro. While Resolve is our preferred NLE, we welcome expert Premiere editors who can deliver professional results.



Technical Foundations: Strong grasp of audio cleanup and mixing, as well as color correction and grading workflows.



RAW Workflow (Preferred): Experience editing and color grading RED RAW footage. If you haven't handled RED RAW, you must be a fast learner capable of managing complex, high-resolution media workflows.



Data & Infrastructure: A reliable, high-speed internet connection is non-negotiable. You will regularly receive hundreds of gigabytes to terabytes of footage and must be comfortable managing that volume of data.



Autonomy & Communication: Excellent written English and a proactive approach to reporting. You must be able to work independently without micromanagement and remain vocal about timelines, challenges, and progress.





*** Bonus / Preferred Skills ***

Motion Graphics: Experience with Fusion, After Effects, or equivalent tools for adding visual layers.



Graphic Design: Ability to create images, maps, diagrams, simple layouts, or visual explainers for complex concepts.



Industry Experience: Previous experience with educational, corporate, or technical content.



Collaboration Tools: Familiarity with structured feedback and client-facing revision workflows (specifically experience with 
).



Subject Matter Interest: A genuine interest in aerospace, defense, science, or complex technical subject matter.





*** Compensation ***

Starting at: $640 (~36,800 PHP) to $1,120 (~93,500 PHP) USD per month, based on 40 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting at: $350 (~20,000 PHP) to $800 (~47,000 PHP) USD per month, based on 20 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting Rate: $4.00 to $10.00 USD per hour.  [*Conversions are approximate.]



Part-Time (20 hrs/week): $305 – $605 USD (~20,000 PHP – 47,000 PHP) monthly.

A Note on AI and Judgment

At EVP, we use advanced tools every day. However, this role requires high level human judgment and Radical Integrity. We are hiring a human, not a prompt. If you use AI to draft your personal responses on the “How to Apply” section, you are failing the first test of this role: Honesty. Thanks for your time and genuine interest!

title: Motion Graphics Video Editor
description:
*** Please read through the entire post before applying.  Thanks! ***



Company Description

Engage Video Production (EVP) creates educational and communication focused video content, primarily for aerospace, defense, and technical clients. Our work helps high stakes organizations explain complex ideas clearly, train teams effectively, and communicate with absolute precision. We operate with a military grade standard of excellence and are looking for a Motion Graphics Artist & Graphic Designer who is ready to grow within a high accountability environment.



The Three Pillars of Success at EVP

To succeed here, you must embody these three core values:



Discipline: You follow through on every task without "floundering" or ghosting. You possess the self-discipline to manage your time and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



Motivation and Dedication: You are dedicated to the mission and the company's growth. You don't just "do a job"; you look for ways to contribute to the overall success of the team.



Radical Integrity and Accountability: You own your mistakes immediately. You have the backbone to point out errors for correction, even if they are your own, because you understand that precision is non-negotiable.



*** Role Overview *** 

This is a dual-focus role. You will be the primary creator for our dedicated explainer and motion graphics videos, but you will also assist in the creation of graphic assets (when needed) for our standard video team. You will coordinate with our video editors to provide the graphic elements, overlays, and design assets that elevate every project we produce.

*** Core Responsibilities *** 

Motion Graphics Mastery: Lead the production of full-scale explainer videos, from storyboarding and asset creation to final animation.

Collaborative Design: Act as the internal design resource for our standard video editors. You will create the lower thirds, callouts, and technical diagrams they need for their edits.

Web & Digital Assets: Design high-fidelity web page elements and marketing collateral that align with our brand and our clients' technical standards.

Brand Consistency: Ensure a "Rising Tide" level of quality across all visual touchpoints, maintaining a clean, professional, and sophisticated aesthetic.



*** Must-Have Technical Skills*** 

Technical Stack: Proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Illustrator, and Photoshop - or similar graphical editing software.



Portfolio: A strong reel showcasing explainer videos and a portfolio of clean, functional graphic design (web elements, technical icons, etc.).



Leadership/Coordination: Ability to work alongside other editors, providing them with the assets they need to succeed on their timelines.



Communication: Exceptional English skills and a proactive communication style.



*** Compensation ***

Starting at: $350 (~20,000 PHP) to $800 (~47,000 PHP) USD per month, based on 20 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting Rate: $4.00 to $10.00 USD per hour.  [*Conversions are approximate.]



Part-Time (20 hrs/week): $305 – $605 USD (~20,000 PHP – 47,000 PHP) monthly.

Full-Time (40 hrs/week): $640 – $1,600 USD (~36,800 – 93,500 PHP) monthly.



Rate Determination: Starting salary/rates are dependent upon experience and demonstrated skill.



A Note on AI and Judgment

At EVP, we use advanced tools every day. However, this role requires high level human judgment and Radical Integrity. We are hiring a human, not a prompt. If you use AI to draft your personal responses in the “How to Apply” section, you are failing the first test of this role: Honesty. We want to hear your real thoughts and see your real personality to ensure you will be a good fit on our team. If your application lacks a unique human voice, it will be discarded. Use AI to assist your workflow later; do not use it to represent your character now.



*** How to Apply ***

To be considered, you must follow these steps exactly. Precision is a requirement for this role.



-Utilize 7 AP or more.



-Subject Line - change it to: "Technical Visual Artist – [Your Name]".



-Provide a link to your best motion and static design work. (No portfolio = no consideration).



-State the 10th word of our "Three Pillars" section.



-In exactly two sentences, describe a specific time you had to fix a mistake you made in a motion graphics project. Use plain English; no AI-generated fluff.



-Attach or link to your CV/resume.  Must be in PDF format only.



-Want to really stand out? Record a 60-second video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself. Tell me why you are the right pick and what about Aerospace & Defense interests you. Start the video by addressing me by name (Ryan). Applicants who include this video move to the top of the list.



Thanks for your time and genuine interest!

title: Client Call Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing structural engineering firm based in Australia and is currently looking for a confident and composed Client Call Coordinator with a strong direct background in client calls and client meetings and has worked in a coordinator project management before. A full-time role from 7:00 AM to 3:30 pm Philippines time, weekdays only.



This role involves direct communication with clients— particularly those related to project delays, drawing status, or technical concerns. Your key responsibility is to act as the first point of contact on the phone, provide a warm and professional experience for the client, and coordinate internally with our design team to ensure timely resolutions.



We are ideally looking for someone who is comfortable under pressure, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys solving  in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Answer incoming client phone calls regarding project updates, delays, or technical questions.



Reassure and guide clients calmly and professionally — especially in high-pressure or escalated situations.



Gather relevant information from clients to assist internal design teams.



Follow up on requests with the design team and ensure clients receive timely responses.



Maintain detailed records of calls and follow-ups using internal systems.



Escalate urgent or complex issues to the appropriate internal tea
mbers.



Build and maintain strong client relationships through consistent and reliable communication.



Assist in improving call-handling procedures and response workflows.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



A university degree or diploma



Previous experience in a client-facing or coordination role is highly desirable.



Excellent verbal communication skills with a calm and empathetic phone manner.



Ability to handle pressure, de-escalate tense situations, and remain composed under stress.



Strong organizational and time management skills.



Comfortable with regular phone interaction as the core part of the role.



Basic understanding of engineering or construction drawings is a PLUS.



Proficient in using collaboration tools (e.g., Teams, CRM systems, call logging software).



NICE TO HAVE:



Familiarity with the design and construction industry.



Experience working with internal engineering or design teams.



Prior work in a support or help desk-style role involving technical discussions.



To apply and be considered, please follow the below: 



1. Please send a link to your most updated CV and a short recording link explaining your relevant experience to the role.

2. Use 3 apply points.



Only those applicants who follow the above instructions will be contacted.

title: GoHighLevel Automation & Funnel Specialist (GHL + WordPress + Integrations)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced GoHighLevel specialist to build, manage, and take ownership of our systems across GoHighLevel and WordPress.



This is not a basic VA role. This role is NOT suitable for beginners or those with limited GoHighLevel / Wordpress experience.

We want someone who can take ownership of funnels, automations, and CRM systems — and continuously improve how everything works.



**Core Responsibilities (PRIMARY)**

- Build and optimise funnels inside GoHighLevel

- Create workflows, automations, and tagging systems

- Set up pipelines and lead routing

- Create products, order forms, and checkout flows

- Build and edit pages in WordPress (Elementor / FunnelKit)

- Fix issues across systems (tracking, forms, integrations)

- Create purchase flows (including QR's) for live events



**Bonus Skills (HIGH VALUE)**

- Experience working with APIs and webhooks

- Ability to connect systems (e.g. ticketing ? CRM)

- Ability to create small plugins or custom integrations



*Additional Bonus (Optional – more hours available)*

- Video editing (for content repurposing, reels, clips)



**Requirements**

- Strong experience with GoHighLevel

- Experience building workflows, funnels, and automations

- Experience with WordPress

- Ability to solve problems independently

- Clear communication and structured thinking



**Screening Questions**

Please answer all questions clearly. Applications without answers will be ignored.

1. Describe a system you have built inside GoHighLevel (funnels, automations, pipelines)

2. What types of issues have you solved in GoHighLevel or WordPress?

3. We run live events where people scan a QR code and either buy or book a call. Explain how you would build this inside  GoHighLevel including a format like funnel structure, tags, automations, follow-up.

4. Have you worked with APIs, webhooks, or integrations? Give a real example.



**Important**

- Please start your application with the words: HIGHLEVEL PRO

- Applications that do not demonstrate clear GoHighLevel experience will not be considered.

title: External Project Manager | Security Systems Installation
description:

• Strong command of the English language with the ability to communicate effectively in both written and verbal form

• Experience managing client communication and stakeholder coordination

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Preferred

Work Schedule

• Must overlap with Eastern Time business hours
salary: Php 60k - Php 75k per month depending on

title: Bookkeeper / Finance Staff
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our Finance team at Sendex Limited. You'll be responsible for managing daily client invoicing, recording payments, and maintaining accurate financial records across multiple client accounts.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Invoice Management

Record and send daily invoices to clients via Slack, upload invoice files to the company drive, and maintain accurate records in the Sendex Customer Balances Sheet — verifying amounts, dates, and currencies (EUR, USD, GBP) before closing.

Payment Recording & Reconciliation

Log into Payoneer to record incoming client payments, match payments to invoices, and ensure all paid invoices are properly marked. Record proof-of-payment submissions from clients and send acknowledgment messages using approved templates in French.



Custom Invoice Processing

Handle client requests for custom invoices by submitting the appropriate Airtable form with accurate billing details.



Payment Follow-Up

Monitor outstanding balances, flag overdue accounts, send timely payment reminders via client Slack channels, and escalate unresolved accounts when necessary.



Weekly Reporting

Send End-of-Week balance updates to clients every Saturday. Prepare and distribute the Payoneer & Client Summary Report every Tuesday and Friday, including Payoneer balance figures and Top 5 clients with the highest outstanding balances.



Sheet & Record Maintenance

Keep the Sendex Customer Balances Sheet updated daily, maintain individual client balance tracking sheets, apply correct tab color-coding for account status, and ensure all formulas and data imports are functioning correctly.



New Client Onboarding

Request billing information from new clients using the approved French-language template and record their details in the customer information database.



Requirements

Experience in bookkeeping, accounts receivable, or a similar finance role

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in data entry

Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel), including formulas and multi-tab workbooks

Familiarity with Payoneer or similar payment platforms is a plus

Ability to communicate professionally in both English and French (written)

Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

Comfortable using Slack as a primary communication tool





Work Setup

Remote / Work from Home

Reports to the Finance Supervisor / Finance Lead

Recurring weekly deadlines (Tuesday, Friday, and Saturday deliverables)



Apply Now — Skip the Line!

For faster processing, please apply directly using this link:





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Google Ads Expert (Part-Time | Remote Work)
description:

This role is best suited for individuals who have a strong background in managing paid search campaigns and are confident working independently in a performance-focused environment.

title: Operations-Focused Virtual Assistant (Project-Based, Multi-Project)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are building a small but growing portfolio of structured digital projects and are assembling a long-term VA operations pool.

This is not a full-time role and not tied to a single project.

Instead, we work with VAs who:

Follow instructions precisely

Are comfortable moving between different projects

Prefer clear scope over creative freedom

Can deliver clean, correct work with minimal supervision

If selected, you may be invited to short, well-defined tasks across multiple projects over time.



HOW WORK IS STRUCTURED

All projects in this portfolio share the same operating principles:

Clear written instructions

Fixed scope and deliverables

Tight constraints (no guessing, no improvising)

Emphasis on clarity, accuracy, and trust

Fast feedback cycles

No client calls

No selling, promising, or defending

Projects may involve documentation, setup, cleanup, posting, auditing, delivery, or coordination work depending on fit.

You will not be asked to redesign projects, invent strategies, or “make it better” unless explicitly instructed.



THIS ROLE IS A FIT IF YOU:

Prefer executing defined tasks over open-ended brainstorming

Are comfortable asking questions only when blocked

Can flag unclear instructions instead of guessing

Respect boundaries, tone rules, and scope

Are open to working on different projects over time

Value consistency and correctness over speed or creativity



THIS ROLE IS NOT A FIT IF YOU:

Want to specialize in one specific niche or project only

Prefer creative freedom or “adding your own ideas”

Need constant feedback or reassurance

Want to manage strategy, direction, or decision-making

Are looking for guaranteed hours or a fixed long-term role



COMPENSATION & TIME

Hourly, project-based

Rates vary by role and responsibility (typically $4–9 USD/hr)

Short-term tasks with potential for repeat work

No minimum hours guaranteed

Strong performers are added to our internal VA pool and contacted directly for future work.



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)

Do not reply to this job post.

All applicants must apply through this form:



The form is the first screen.

Incomplete or low-effort submissions will not be reviewed. 



List any specific system competencies in the artifacts section (GHL, Canva, Microsoft Word, 
, etc.)



Please read the form instructions carefully and answer based on the role type you are best suited for.



FINAL NOTE

We are intentionally selective.

If you enjoy structured work, clear expectations, and operating inside well-defined systems, this will be a good fit.

If not, this is probably not the right environment for you — and that’s okay.

Thank you for applying carefully.

title: Job Title  Inside Sales Representative (Lead Qualification & Appointment Setting)
description:
About the Role



This is a sales role, not a virtual assistant position.



You will be speaking with inbound leads who are interested in owning a franchise, qualifying them, and booking calls with our clients.



Your role is critical in turning leads into real business opportunities.



If you are not comfortable speaking on the phone and following up consistently, this is not the right fit.



What You’ll Be Doing



- Call new leads quickly after they come in (speed is critical)

- Qualify leads based on:

    - Interest in owning a franchise

    - Financial capability

    - Timeline and seriousness

- Follow up through:

    - Phone calls

    - SMS

    -

- Book qualified leads into the calendar

- Re-engage no-shows and unresponsive leads

- Keep CRM (GoHighLevel) updated with clear notes and statuses

- Follow structured scripts and SOPs (provided)



What We’re Looking For



- Strong spoken and written English

- Confident and comfortable on phone calls

- Sales mindset (not just task execution)

- Consistent follow-up and attention to detail

- Fast response time and high ownership



Nice to Have



- Experience in:

    - Appointment setting

    - Lead qualification

    - High-ticket or phone-based sales

- Familiar with GoHighLevel, Zoho or similar CRM



Work Schedule



- Full-time

- Must overlap with North American time zones (PST preferred)



Compensation



- Base pay (depending on experience)

- Performance incentives based on:

    - Qualified leads

    - Booked calls

    - Show-up rates



Important



This is not a passive role.



You are expected to follow up with leads consistently and take ownership of your pipeline.



How to Apply



To be considered, follow these steps:



1. Record a 1-2 minute voice message answering:

    

    A lead showed interest in owning a franchise business, completed a form to request more information, but stopped responding after your first call attempt. What would you do over the next 3 days?

    

2. Write a short follow-up message you would send to a lead who missed their scheduled call

3. Start your application with: “Closer”



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be considered.



Why Join Us



- Work with growing franchise brands

- Learn real sales and lead conversion skills

- Opportunity to grow into a senior sales role

title: Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market
description:
Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Engagement Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor (40 hours per week, Australian Business Hours)



Company: CDM Direct



About Us CDM Direct is a leading provider of outsourced operational support and customer experience solutions. We are currently executing a major expansion across the Australia and New Zealand (ANZ) markets, specifically targeting the Aged Care and National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) sectors.



We provide high-value, tech-enabled operational support—including our flagship 'Rostering as a Service' (RaaS) solution powered by Zoom Contact Centre AI—to solve severe administrative, financial, and compliance bottlenecks for healthcare providers.



The Role This is not a scripted call centre role. This is a highly strategic, consultative B2B sales position working directly alongside our Australian leadership team.



As our market expansion lead, you will be responsible for driving new business acquisition across the ANZ health sector. You will:

• Conduct highly targeted, unscripted outreach to engage senior business decision-makers (CEOs, CFOs, Partners, and Operations Managers).

• Lead commercial conversations to uncover operational chaos, staffing bottlenecks, and financial pain points.

• Position CDM Direct’s RaaS and outsourced solutions with absolute clarity and commercial credibility.

• Secure "Qualified Meetings" (QMBs) for our senior sales executives, directly driving the top of the revenue pipeline.



The Ideal Candidate (The "Hunter") We are exclusively recruiting Tier 1 B2B sales talent. To succeed in this role, you must possess severe commercial resilience and a genuine "hunter" mentality. You will be dealing with busy executives in a highly regulated industry; you must be comfortable handling objections, navigating gatekeepers, and creating commercial urgency from scratch.



• Minimum 3+ years of proven success in outbound B2B sales, KPO, or SaaS business development.

• Exceptional, polished English communication skills capable of peer-to-peer conversations with Australian C-Suite executives.



• Deep discipline, self-management, and the resilience to execute daily strategic outreach in a remote environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Entry-level customer service or call centre agents.

• Telemarketers who rely on rigid scripts.

• Candidates seeking a passive account management role; this is a proactive pipeline-generation position.



Remuneration & Commercial Benefits



We offer a highly lucrative, performance-driven commercial package designed to reward top performers:



• Base Retainer: PHP 85,000 per month.

• Health & Wellbeing: Up to PHP 50,000 annual allowance to fully reimburse the cost of a premium private HMO plan for you and one dependent.

• Year-End Bonus: An annual service bonus equivalent to one month's base fee (13th month), paid in December.

• Activity Bonus: NZ$50 for every Qualified Meeting Booked (QMB) to supplement your income while your pipeline builds.

• Revenue Commission: An uncapped 2.5% commission on the Year 1 Contract Value of closed deals, with an accelerator to 5% for high performance.



• Leave & Lifestyle: You will observe standard Australian public holidays as non-working days without any reduction to your base fee. After 12 months, you are permitted 10 days of planned unavailability per annum.



How to Apply



If you have the resilience and the commercial acumen to drive this expansion, please submit:

1. Your updated CV.

2. A link to your LinkedIn profile.

3. A brief cover letter outlining your most successful experience generating outbound B2B meetings with senior executives.

title: Operations VA — Proposals, Contracts & Project Tracking | US Architecture & Construction Firm | Full-Time 9–5 PST
description:
Post Body:

We are a US-based architecture and construction company looking for a detail-oriented Operations VA to run our back office. You will prepare proposals, draft contracts, track project timelines, organize documentation, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



This is a behind-the-scenes role — you will not be on the phone with clients. Your job is to make sure everything the business sends out is professional, accurate, and on time.



If you love systems, spreadsheets, checklists, and making order out of chaos — this is your role.



What You'll Do

- Draft proposals and contracts in Google Docs using AI tools and templates we provide

- Send proposals and contracts for e-signature, track status, and follow up until signed

- Maintain a pipeline tracker — every lead, proposal, project, and deadline in one place

- Track permit status, plan check timelines, and city/engineer correspondence

- Organize Google Drive — maintain clean, consistent folder structures per project and entity

- Prepare project documents: transmittals, RFIs, submittals, meeting notes

- Collect and track vendor documentation — insurance certs, lien waivers, W-9s

- Coordinate with the team on deliverables and deadlines

- Use AI tools daily to draft, research, and improve efficiency



Who You Are

- Excellent written English — professional, clear, error-free

- Extremely detail-oriented — you catch typos, missing attachments, and inconsistencies

- Organized and systematic — you create and maintain trackers, checklists, and SOPs

- Comfortable with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar)

- Actively use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and see them as essential, not optional

- Proactive — you flag problems before they become emergencies

- Work independently once trained — you don't need daily supervision



How We Work

- Full-time: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PST) — this is non-negotiable

- You will share your screen live via 
 during work hours

- Time is tracked using Hubstaff (screenshots + activity tracking)

- Payment via Wise, monthly

- We use Google Chat and 
 for all team communication

- This is a long-term role — we are building a team, not looking for temporary help



How to Apply — READ CAREFULLY

Include ALL of the following in your application or you will not be considered:

- Put the word "CORNERSTONE" in your subject line so we know you read this entire post

- Attach your resume (PDF preferred)

- Record a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself — tell us about your experience with document preparation and how you use AI in your work (paste the Loom link in your application)

- One example of how you've used AI in your work (any tool — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)



- BONUS: If you have a sample document, tracker, or system you've built, include a link. We want to see how you think and organize.



What Happens After You Apply

If your application is strong, we will message you to schedule a short video call. You should be available to take this call between 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST with your camera on and in a quiet environment. We may reach out the same day, so be ready.

Your application itself is the first test — if it has typos or is disorganized, that tells us everything we need to know.

title: Office Administrator
description:
Nexia Health Care is a pioneering leader in Australian Health Care, delivering holistic care solutions for children and adolescents. We are one of the few organizations nationwide offering an innovative multidisciplinary model that integrates paediatricians, psychiatrists, and allied health professionals, ensuring seamless and continuous care for our young clients. At Nexia, we aim to create a community that supports children throughout their entire mental health journey, providing comprehensive services under one roof.



We are looking for a dedicated Customer Relationship Officer to join our team and support the smooth operation of our clinic while ensuring our clients and their families receive the highest level of care and customer service.



About the Role



As an Office Administrator at Nexia Health Care, you will play a key role in managing the daily administrative functions of the clinic and acting as the first point of contact for our clients. Your responsibilities will include:



Managing clinician schedules, appointments, and reminders

Overseeing the clinic’s administrative processes, including billing, document review and processing, and payment reconciliation

Tend to
s and communications received through our clinical software

Collate and format clinical reports to be sent out to our customers following assessments

Maintaining accurate customer records in our CRM system

Coordinating meetings and facilitating effective communication between clinic staff, clients, and external stakeholders

Work collaboratively with clinical and specialist team

Upholding strict confidentiality and privacy standards in line with the Privacy Act

Supporting the clinic in compliance with healthcare regulations and participating in quality assurance initiatives.



Who We Are Looking For



We are seeking an enthusiastic individual with:



Proven experience in an administrative role, ideally within a healthcare or clinic setting

Compassion and empathy when working with children, adolescents, and their families

Strong organizational skills and the ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and familiarity with Google systems

Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written

Ability to work with autonomy and independence



Tools You’ll Use

- Caalano Digital + Custom Built CRM

- Outlook

- Slack

- Halaxy

- Medirecords



Compensation

- PHP 40,000-50,000 per month (depending on experience)

- 13th-month pay



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS:

**please follow the steps properly or your application will be automatically declined**



To submit your application for the job, please complete all of the following steps and respond to the job add by sending an
 to 
 with the subject line "Office Administrator - I have read the whole Ad".



1. Please create a 2-3 minute audio recording or video of yourself looking at the camera, stating the date and time and explaining why you would be a good fit for this position and why you are the best candidate. Then send me a link to the audio or video.

2. Perform an Internet speed test at https://www.speedtest.net/ by clicking the “start” button in the middle of their homepage. After completion of the test, take a screenshot of your results and
 me this picture in jpeg format.

3. Send me the link to your onlinejobs.ph profile along with your CV/Resume.



The application process is designed to ensure you follow directions and pay attention to detail.



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Prospect Research & Data Enrichment Analyst
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented research analyst for an ongoing role owning our prospect database. Kobble is Australia's licensed Banking-as-a-Service platform. 



What you'll do:

• Audit and clean 1,000+ existing contacts — deduplication, missing fields, standardisation

• Enrich records and map 2–3 decision-makers per target account

• Segment by ICP: fintechs, insurers, banks, corporates, government — tier A/B/C

• Add 50–100 new qualified prospects per week

• Monitor trigger events and maintain an investor research list

• Weekly data quality report

Stack: Apollo · LinkedIn Sales Navigator · Google Sheets · Attio · ASIC/ABN Lookup



Engagement: Ongoing · $200–$350 AUD/month



***Please read the below questions before applying. Your proposal should address the questions outlined there.



Your Proposal Must Include a 10-Point Action Plan

1. How you'll audit the existing 1,000+ prospect list and identify data gaps

2. Deduplication and standardisation methodology — tools and rules

3. Enrichment approach — sources, order, and how you handle records that can't be enriched

4. Decision-maker mapping process — how you identify the right 2–3 contacts per target account

5. ICP segmentation criteria and how you'd tier A/B/C prospects

6. How you'll handle Australian-specific research — ASIC lookups, ABN verification, local sources

7. Weekly workflow — hours, tasks, and cadence

8. Trigger event monitoring approach — what events you track and how you surface them

9. Data quality metrics you'd report on weekly

10. How you'd coordinate handoffs with the outbound team and CRM specialist to avoid data conflicts



8 Vetting Questions — Address These in Your Application

1. Show an example of a prospect database you've built or maintained for a B2B company. How many

records? What enrichment sources? What was your data accuracy rate?

2. We have 1,000+ existing contacts that need cleaning and enrichment. Walk us through your first 5

days — what do you do, in what order?

3. How do you find verified
 addresses and direct phone numbers for senior executives (CTO,

CEO, CFO level) at mid-market companies? What's your typical hit rate?

4. Our targets span fintechs, insurers, non-bank financials, banks, corporates, and government in

Australia. How would you approach segmenting and prioritising these differently?

5. We need trigger event monitoring at target companies — funding rounds, exec hires, regulatory

changes. What tools and processes do you use? Give a specific example.

6. How do you handle data conflicts — two records for the same person, or conflicting information

across sources? What's your resolution process?

7. We also need an investor target list built and maintained (VCs, growth funds, family offices with

fintech thesis). Have you done investor research before? Show an example or describe your

approach.

8. What's your weekly capacity in hours, and how many new qualified, enriched records can you

realistically deliver per week at a consistent quality standard?

title: Project Manager (Real Estate & Land Investments)
description:
Project Manager (Real Estate Flips & Land - Part-Time, Potential for Full-Time)



About Us:



We are a new real estate investment company focused on acquiring, renovating, and flipping properties for profit. We also do land flipping. We are looking for a highly organized and experienced Project Manager to oversee the renovation process from start to finish. This is a part-time, per-project position with the potential to evolve into a full-time role as our business expands.



Job Summary:



The Project Manager will be responsible for the successful execution of our real estate flip projects. You will manage all aspects of the renovation, including contractor oversight, material procurement, budget management, and ensuring projects are completed on time and within budget.



Responsibilities:



Project Planning & Execution:

Develop and manage project timelines and budgets.

Coordinate and supervise contractors and subcontractors.

Ensure all work is completed to a high standard and in compliance with local codes and regulations.

Proactively identify and resolve potential project delays or issues.

Vendor & Material Management:

Source, negotiate with, and manage vendors and suppliers.

Procure materials and schedule deliveries to job sites.

Track and manage material inventory.

Virtual Site Management:

Request videos from contractors  to monitor progress and quality of work on weekly basis.

Address any on-site issues or concerns promptly.

Ensure a safe and clean work environment.

Communication & Reporting:

Provide regular updates to the CEO on project status, budget, and timelines.

Communicate effectively with all stakeholders, including contractors, suppliers, and the CEO.

Manage project documentation, including contracts, invoices, and change orders.

Design & Aesthetics:

Create design boards and aesthetic choices for renovations.

Implement design plans effectively, ensuring the final product aligns with the desired vision.



Qualifications:



Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management, specifically in residential renovation or construction. Land investment experience is a bonus.

Must possess a recognized Project Management certification (e.g., PMP, CAPM, or similar).

Strong knowledge of construction processes, materials, and building codes.

Proven ability to manage budgets and timelines effectively.

Excellent communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Proficiency in project management software and tools.

Familiarity with design trends and aesthetics in residential renovation is a plus.

Must have excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.



Bonus Points:



Experience with "boring" or standardized renovation processes (as described in the lesson - highlight if they understand this concept).

Experience managing projects remotely.



Compensation:



This is a part-time, per-project position.

Pay: Negotiable

Potential for transition to a full-time, salaried position with benefits based on performance and company growth.

To Apply:



Please submit your resume, cover letter, and copies of your project management certifications. In your cover letter, please highlight your experience with residential renovation projects, your project management methodology, and your understanding of budget and timeline management. Please also provide references from previous clients or employers.



I have made sure to include:



Experience Level: Specified the 5 years of PM experience.

Certification: Explicitly required a PM certification.

Part-Time/Full-Time: Clearly stated the part-time, per-project start with potential for full-time.

Real Estate Specifics: Focused the experience on residential renovation/flipping.

Responsibilities from the Lesson: Incorporated key tasks mentioned in the lesson, such as managing contractors, materials, and budgets.

"Boring Flips" Reference: Added a "bonus points" section to see if they understood the concept of standardized renovations.

Remember to tailor the bracketed sections to accurately reflect your specific needs and budget.

title: Internal Sales Agent - The Milner Team
description:
We are building a system-driven, scalable real estate business. Our team currently has 5+ agents, a strong digital marketing engine producing inbound buyer leads through
 video ads, and a database of 9,500+ leads ready to be worked. We need a motivated, disciplined ISA to be the engine that turns all of this into booked appointments and closed deals.



This is not a temporary gig. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. As the team scales, your role, compensation, and responsibility will grow with it.



The Role

You will be the first point of contact for all incoming leads and the person responsible for making sure no lead goes untouched. Your job is to call, text, follow up, qualify, and book appointments for our real estate agents. You are not closing deals yourself. You are setting up our agents to close by getting qualified buyers and sellers in front of them.



What You Will Do Every Day



Speed-to-Lead (Top Priority)

• Call every new inbound
 lead within 5 minutes of it coming in

• Send an immediate text and
 follow-up if they don't answer

• Your goal is to be the fastest response the lead gets from any agent or team



Outbound Calling (4 Hours/Day)

• Call expired listings from our daily lead feed (~200/month)

• Call and follow up with inbound buyer leads from
 ads (~
/month)

• Call old leads from our database (~9,500 contacts) for reactivation

• Target: 45 dials per hour using a power dialer = 180 dials per day minimum



Follow-Up Sequences

• Execute structured follow-up: 10-15 contact attempts in the first 14 days on every new lead

• Log every call, text, and note in our CRM (Lofty)

• If an agent misses a follow-up, you step in and make the call

• Manage long-term nurture on leads not ready to buy/sell immediately



Appointment Setting

• Qualify leads: timeline, budget, financing status, location preferences

• Book consultations between qualified leads and our agents

• Confirm appointments 24 hours before and day-of

• Hand off a clean, qualified lead with full notes so the agent walks into the meeting prepared



CRM Management

• Keep all lead records updated in Lofty with status, notes, and next steps

• Tag and categorize leads by source, temperature, and timeline

• Flag hot leads immediately to the team lead or assigned agent

• Track your own KPIs: dials, contacts, conversations, appointments set, appointments held

 

Requirements

Must Have

• Excellent spoken and written English (you will be calling American homebuyers and sellers)

• Experience with outbound calling, cold calling, or telemarketing (real estate ISA experience is a strong plus)

• Comfortable making
+ dials per day and having real conversations

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace for calling

• Ability to work during US Eastern Time hours (at least 4 consecutive calling hours per day)

• Familiarity with CRM systems (we use Lofty, but we will train you)

• Self-motivated, disciplined, and able to work independently without micromanagement

Nice to Have

• Previous experience as a real estate ISA or appointment setter

• Familiarity with US real estate terminology (pre-approval, MLS, closing, etc.)

• Experience with Lofty, Follow Up Boss, KVCore, or similar real estate CRMs

• Experience with power dialers (Mojo, PhoneBurner, etc.)

• Spanish language skills (bonus, not required)

Schedule

Hours: Full-time, Monday through Friday

Calling hours: 4 hours per day of dedicated outbound calling (during US Eastern business hours, typically 9 AM - 1 PM or 10 AM - 2 PM ET)

Remaining hours: CRM management, follow-up sequences, lead organization, texting/emailing, appointment confirmations, KPI tracking

Total: Approximately 6-8 hours per day depending on volume



Compensation

Base Rate: $5 USD/hour

Performance Bonus: $150 USD per closed deal that you sourced, set, or touched

Estimated Monthly Earnings: $800-$1,400+ USD/month depending on hours and closed deals

Growth: As the team grows and your results prove out, there is room for rate increases, additional bonuses, and potential management of additional ISAs.



What Success Looks Like

In your first 30 days:

You understand our CRM, our lead sources, and our follow-up process. You are making 150+ dials per day. You are logging every contact in Lofty. New leads are being called within 5 minutes. You have booked your first appointments.



In your first 90 days:

The Milner Team  |  Florida Future Realty  |  Cape Coral, FL

title: Outbound Caller & Zoho CRM Specialist – DME Healthcare (US Hours)
description:
Zivan Medical Supply is a licensed home medical equipment (DME) provider 

serving patients and home health agencies across Virginia, Maryland, 

Pennsylvania, and Delaware. We deliver walkers, hospital beds, wheelchairs, 

and bathroom safety equipment directly to patients' homes.



We are hiring ONE detail-oriented, phone-confident VA to own both our Zoho 

setup and our daily outbound calling.



PHASE 1 - WEEKS 1 & 2 (Setup):

- Build Zoho CRM pipeline with custom stages for healthcare outreach

- Import home health agency data into CRM

- Build 3 workflow automations (follow-up tasks, hot lead alerts, reports)

- Set up 3
 drip campaign in Zoho Campaigns

- Configure Zoho Desk with auto-responses

- Run full system test and submit sign-off report



PHASE 2 - WEEK 3 ONWARD (Execution):

- Make 40-50 outbound calls per day to home health agencies (script provided)

- Log every call in Zoho CRM immediately with outcome and notes

- Send 30+ follow-up
s daily via Zoho Campaigns

- Move leads through pipeline and flag hot prospects immediately

- Submit detailed weekly report every Friday by 5PM ET



ONGOING:

- Manage Google Business Profile weekly

- Submit Zivan to 10+ online directories

- Write 2 short SEO blog posts per month

- Track rankings via Google Search Console



REQUIREMENTS:

- Zoho CRM experience (pipelines, workflows, imports) - REQUIRED

- Outbound cold calling experience - REQUIRED

- Excellent spoken and written English - REQUIRED

- Available Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM Eastern Time - REQUIRED

- Stable internet and quiet workspace for calls - REQUIRED

- Healthcare or DME experience - strong advantage

- Zoho Campaigns, Desk, or Books experience - strong advantage



TARGETS (Month 1):

- 400+ outbound calls

- 300+
s sent

- 25-30 warm prospects

- 5-8 meetings scheduled

- 2-3 confirmed referral partners



This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time for the right person.

We are a woman-owned US healthcare startup and we invest in people who perform.

title: Operations Coordinator - Commercial Cleaning Company
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Operations Coordinator to join our team. In this role, you will oversee contractor relationships, coordinate daily operations, and conduct daily inspections. This position requires strong organizational skills, a customer-first mindset, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Contractor Management

Identify, vet, and onboard qualified independent cleaning contractors.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date contractor profiles, documentation, and compliance records.

Monitor contractor performance, address quality or service issues, and provide constructive feedback.

Support and guide contractors to ensure consistent service delivery.



Scheduling & Operations

Coordinate job schedules to ensure timely service delivery and proper staffing.

Manage schedule changes, last-minute requests, and conflict resolution efficiently.

Track service completion and follow up on outstanding work orders.



Customer Experience

Conduct regular customer inspections to ensure service quality standards are met or exceeded.

Respond to customer inquiries, concerns, and service requests professionally.

Actively secure, online reviews and referrals.



Qualifications

2+ years of experience in operations, customer support, or account management in business services

Excellent written and conversational English skills

Strong organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to manage multiple priorities and thrive in a fast-paced environment.

Proficiency with scheduling systems, CRM platforms, or similar tools.

Customer-focused attitude with a proactive and professional approach.

Spanish language skills are not necessary but would be a strong positive



Compensation: $5 per hour

Time zone: Pacific Standard Time

title: Sales Closer | WFH | Filipino Clients | Dayshift
description:
Help Filipino families and OFW's secure or refinance their home loans - and change their lives.



**About Nook**



Nook is the Philippines’ first digital mortgage brokerage. We help homeowners get home loans from our major banking partners (BDO, BPI, etc) - faster, smarter, and fully online.



Backed by major bank partners and cutting-edge tech tools, we’re on a mission to help 1 million Filipino families save money and pay off their homes sooner. 



And we’re not doing it with old-school brokers… we’re building a sales machine.



** The Role: Remote Sales Closer**



We’re hiring experienced sales closers who know how to move deals forward.



Not admins. Not processors. Not paper-pushers. Closers.



If you’ve sold to US, AU, or UK customers (real estate, telco, insurance, fintech, etc.) - we want you.



This is NOT a customer service role. This is a high-performance sales role for people who love closing deals, hitting targets, and getting results for clients.



** What You’ll Do**



- Handle warm, pre-qualified leads who already want a home loan

- Guide clients through their home loan options (full training provided)

- Collect documents using our AI tools (no need to chase paperwork manually)

- Follow up with clients and banks to move deals forward fast

- Hit your monthly referral, approval, and booking targets

- Be part of a high-performance remote team that wins together



** You’re a Fit If You Have:**



- 2+ years of experience in inbound, outbound or consultative sales (BPO, telco, fintech, SaaS, insurance, etc.)

- A personal track record of hitting sales KPIs and closing deals

- Excellent, confident communication skills (written & spoken - Tagalog and occasional English)

- Experience using CRMs (Zoho, Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

- High accountability, self-motivation, and hunger for results

- Quiet WFH setup (laptop/desktop with strong internet, headset, no background noise)



** Bonus Points If You:**



- Have worked with US/AU/UK-based companies

- Understand mortgage, real estate, or finance (not required - we’ll train you anyway)

- Want to grow fast in a startup that rewards performance



** What You Get**



- Base salary and sales bonuses

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- Weekly coaching and performance feedback

- AI tools that make your work faster and easier

- Be part of a high-growth fintech startup transforming an entire industry



** This Role Is Not for:**



- PH banking staff or back-office processors

- Passive agents waiting on leads to “d
”

- People afraid to follow up or ask for the sale

- Job hoppers or multi-jobbers (please don’t apply)



** How to Apply**



Send your resume + DISC profile result

title: Real Estate Operations Systems Architect (Automation & Admin)
description:
Long Term Part Time



The Reality Check

I am a busy  Realtor. I am a rainmaker. I move at the speed of light, I close deals, and am always work to expand my business and brand. But my "Drunk Monkey" brain creates a wake of chaos.



I am looking for a System Ninja who finds deep, meditative peace in creating order. You aren't here to take orders; you are here to build the engine and guard the clients so I can stay in my "Zone ".



What You’ll Be Doing (The Architecture of Flow)



Kill the Friction (Automation): You will use  apps like Zapier, 
, and GoHighLevel to automate the boring stuff. If I have to touch manual data entry, the system has failed.





Follow the existing  (SOPs) and build on and create your own SOP's.  You will observe my "fast and loose" process and turn it into flawless, step-by-step SOPs that ensure the business runs even if we’re both on vacation.





Guard the Temple (The CRM): You are the "Data Police". You ensure every lead is tagged, every note is updated, leads are followed up on,  and the pipeline is a source of truth, not a source of stress.



Enlightened Client Care: You are the calm voice in the storm for my clients. You handle the "high-touch" follow-ups, ensure they feel like royalty during the listing process, and coordinate the moving pieces so they have a "5-star" experience without me having to manage the minutiae.





Predict the Future (Analytics): You’ll use Python or Advanced Analytics to show me exactly where our money is coming from and where the leaks are.



Are You the One? (The Frequency)



You Are a Hybrid: You have the logic of a Computer Scientist but the emotional intelligence and communication skills of a Master Teacher.





You Love the "Grid": You don't find spreadsheets boring; you find them beautiful.





You Have "Backbone": When my high energy tries to bypass the system, you have the quiet confidence to say, "Boss, stay in your lane; the system handles that".





Global Pedigree: You’ve thrived in high-pressure environments like Accenture or handled complex  accounts.





How to apply:



Please click the "Apply for this Job" button. To ensure you’ve read this full post, please start your message with the subject line: "I am your next  Admin Rockstar



In your message, please include:



A link to your updated portfolio or resume.



One sentence on why you are the best fit for this specific role.



Your expected monthly salary in  USD.



Your available working hours (in CST)



Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions or use the correct subject line will unfortunately not be considered. Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Experienced Associate Brand Manager to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Role Overview



We're hiring 2 Associate Brand Manager who will work directly under the Senior Brand Manager to execute day-to-day brand operations. This is a hands-on role focused on the “legwork” that drives performance: optimizing listings, managing keyword research, coordinating creative projects, and pulling actionable data.



If the Senior Brand Manager sets the playbook, the Associate Brand Manager runs the plays — ensuring everything gets executed on time, correctly, and at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Management & Optimization

Create, update, and fully optimize Amazon product listings (titles, bullets, descriptions, images, videos, A+ content).

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to improve rankings and visibility.

Ensure all listings remain Rufus and Cosmos compliant with Amazon’s latest requirements.

Test content variations (A/B testing) to improve CTR and conversions.



2. Data Research & Analysis

Pull performance data from Amazon Seller Central and external tools (Data Dive, Helium 10, Jungle Scout).

Identify trends, keyword shifts, and competitor activity.

Provide actionable recommendations to the Senior Brand Manager to improve conversions, CTR, and sales velocity.



3. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with the graphic design team to request, coordinate, and deliver images, infographics, and A+ creatives.

Partner with the marketing team to support product launches, promotions, and review-generation initiatives.

Ensure all projects are aligned with deadlines, strategy, and brand guidelines.



4. Conversion-Focused Execution

Continuously update and refine listings to improve conversion rates and customer engagement.

Maintain Amazon Brand Stores, A+ content, and ad creatives for consistency and performance.

Assist in preparing assets for influencer campaigns and external marketing pushes.



5. Project & Compliance Support

Own the administrative “heavy lifting” of flat files, bulk uploads, and catalog troubleshooting.

Flag compliance issues, unauthorized sellers, or listing errors for quick resolution.

Support market expansion efforts by preparing research and draft listings for new product opportunities.



Skills & Qualifications



2+ years experience in Amazon FBA operations, brand management, or digital marketing.

Proficient in Amazon Seller Central, flat files, listing creation, and troubleshooting.

Strong skills in SEO, keyword research, and listing optimization.

Data-driven mindset; confident in Google Sheets and reporting.

Strong communication skills to work cross-functionally with design, marketing, and operations teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple deadlines.



What Success Looks Like

Every listing across assigned brands is fully optimized, compliant, and performing.

Senior Brand Manager receives clear, accurate reports and recommendations.

Creative assets are delivered on time because you coordinated smoothly with design.



Product launches happen seamlessly with marketing and review strategies in place.

Conversions and rankings consistently improve due to your execution. If you feel you are the right fit, please respond to the job with the title " The Best Supporting Branding Manager Out There!"



Please respond directly to :

----------



Kind Regards,

Tam Ma

Co Founder

Prodigy Media

title: Wix Studio Developer – Optimize for Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile (15 -16  Pages)
description:
We have a professionally designed website in Figma — approximately 15 large pages — that has been imported into Wix Studio and fully optimized across all three breakpoints: desktop, tablet, and mobile.

The Figma file includes side-by-side designs showing exactly how each page should look on all three screen sizes. You will be given full access to the Figma file as a reference.



What You'll Be Doing

optimize all 15 pages for desktop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints

Ensure pixel-accurate layout, spacing, fonts, and images match the Figma designs on every screen size

Make sure all sections, elements, and content stack and resize properly on each breakpoint

Test responsiveness across devices before final delivery



Requirements

Proven experience with Wix Studio (not regular Wix — must know Wix Studio specifically)

understanding of responsive design and breakpoint optimization

Ability to read and follow Figma designs precisely

Portfolio or examples of previous Wix Studio projects required

Good English communication and ability to give progress updates

Must be detail-oriented — pixel accuracy matters



Nice to Have

Experience importing Figma files into Wix Studio using the Figma-to-Wix Studio plugin

Experience with large, content-heavy pages
