title: Social Media Virtual Assistant
description:
Margaret Stolmack

Life Transitions Blueprint



SOCIAL MEDIA VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — JOB DESCRIPTION

JOB OVERVIEW

Position Social Media Virtual Assistant

Location Remote — Philippines based

Hours Approx. 10–15 hours per week (flexible)

Rate A$7.00 per hour

Platforms LinkedIn · YouTube · Substack · Skool

Start Date As soon as possible

Reporting to Margaret Stolmack directly

ABOUT THIS ROLE

Margaret Stolmack is an Australian thought leader, coach and founder of Exceptional Talent and the Life Transitions Blueprint — a multi-platform brand dedicated to helping people navigate all types of life transitions, including career change, retirement, relationships, health, and personal reinvention.

We are looking for a reliable, proactive and skilled Social Media Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to help manage and grow our presence across four key platforms. You will work closely with Margaret to bring her content strategy to life, scheduling posts, managing community engagement, and supporting the production of content alongside her co-host Simon.

PLATFORMS YOU WILL MANAGE

Platform Brand Title Tone

LinkedIn Shift Body Mind Career Professional & corporate — 11,000+ followers

YouTube The Reinvention Lab Casual & conversational — co-hosted with Simon

Substack The Presence Practice Expert voice — deep dives, newsletters & video

Skool The Presence Practice Warm & community-focused — all transition types

YOUR KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Content Scheduling & Publishing 

• Schedule and publish 3 posts per week across all four platforms

• Adapt Margaret's content to suit each platform's tone and format

• Upload YouTube videos, write descriptions, and add correct hashtags

• Format and publish Substack newsletters with embedded video links

• Post live blog updates to LinkedIn and Skool as directed by Margaret



Community Management 

• Monitor and respond to comments on LinkedIn, YouTube and Skool daily

• Welcome new Skool community members warmly

• Flag any important comments or questions to Margaret promptly

• Help grow community engagement with thoughtful replies



Content Support 

• Draft post captions and social copy from Margaret's notes or briefs

• Research relevant hashtags and trending topics in life transitions

• Create simple graphics using Canva if required

• Repurpose content across platforms — e.g. YouTube clips for LinkedIn



Reporting 

• Send a brief weekly update to Margaret summarising posts published and engagement highlights

• Flag any issues or opportunities you notice across the platforms

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Proven experience managing LinkedIn, YouTube, Substack and/or Skool

• Excellent written English — clear, warm and professional

• Reliable, honest and communicative — you respond promptly and keep your commitments

• Experience working with Australian or international clients remotely

• Understanding of life coaching, wellness or personal development content is a strong advantage

• Able to work independently and use initiative without constant supervision

• Familiar with Canva for basic graphics (desirable but not essential)

• Available for a short video call with Margaret before starting

WHAT WE OFFER

• A$7.00 per hour, paid weekly or fortnightly — your preference

• Flexible hours — work at times that suit you

• Ongoing, stable work with a growing brand

• A kind, respectful and supportive working relationship with Margaret

• Full content brief and strategy provided — no guesswork

• Opportunity to grow with the brand as it expands

HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please send the following to Margaret directly:

• A short introduction about yourself and your experience

• Examples of social media accounts or content you have managed

• Your availability and preferred working hours

• Confirmation that you are comfortable with A$7.00 per hour



Important: Please begin your application with the words "I have read your full brief" — this helps us identify candidates who pay attention to detail.



Margaret Stolmack  ·  Life Transitions Blueprint  ·  
  ·  March 2026

title: TikTok Video Editor ($3,000-$5,000 / month, Flexible Working Hours)
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: https://exchange-life-community.notion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f1855927780788969ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Freight/Cargo Forwarding | Transport Operations
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



At DG Air, we’ve specialised in dangerous goods logistics for over 25 years. Whether it’s trucking hazardous materials across state lines or exporting life-saving radiopharmaceuticals to New Zealand, we support the industries that build and protect the world. With rigorous safety standards, advanced systems, and a strong culture of accountability, our mission is to minimise risk, protect communities, and preserve the environment for future generations.



We are currently hiring experienced Freight Forwarders / Cargo Transport Operators to join our growing operations support team remotely from the Philippines.



We’re looking for professionals with a solid background in international freight forwarding, especially those confident using CargoWise. While experience with Dangerous Goods is not required, we will provide full training through our certified programs.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role working closely with our Australian-based team. You’ll receive training, ongoing support, and the chance to develop new qualifications while contributing to an organisation that values your skills and dedication.



RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you’ll play an important part in the global logistics chain by supporting the safe and efficient movement of cargo. Your duties will include:



# Managing import and export cargo through air and sea freight systems

# Coordinating interstate transport of cargo (including DG) across road and air

# Liaising with shipping lines, agents, and internal teams to ensure deadlines are met

# Working closely with our Australian-based operations staff

# Ensuring all data in CargoWise is entered accurately and on time

# Tracking shipments and assisting with problem-solving if issues arise

# Supporting compliance with industry regulations and documentation standards



QUALIFICATIONS

To be successful in this role, you should have:



# Strong working knowledge of CargoWise in a freight forwarding environment

# Experience with End to End international shipping operations (imports & exports)

# High attention to detail and disciplined use of freight systems and data entry

# Good written and verbal communication skills

# The ability to work effectively with international teams

# A proactive, team-oriented mindset and strong time management skills



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for someone who is reliable, disciplined, and takes pride in delivering high-quality work. You enjoy working as part of a team, are detail-oriented, and thrive in a fast-moving logistics environment. You want to grow professionally and contribute to a company that values collaboration, training, and long-term partnerships.

title: Remote Bookkeeper - US eCommerce & QBO Specialist
description:
We're an established eCommerce business looking for a detail-oriented bookkeeper to own our numbers. If you find satisfaction in clean, reconciled books and understand the unique accounting challenges of online retail, this role was built for you. We're looking for a long-term partner who treats the books like their own business.



What you'll do:



* Clean up 9 months backlog (priorityy)

* Maintaining the books of the company in QBO

* Running various reports to measure financial stability

* Communicating with department heads for budgeting and account balances

* Performing basic AR and AP functions

* Monthly/Quarterly/Year end closings, overseeing and preparing for periodic financial closings.

* Reconciliations: Regularly reconciling bank statements, credit cards, and other accounts.

* Familiarity with tax filing processes and working with tax professionals



You're a Great Fit If You:



- Have 3+ years of bookkeeping experience, ideally in an eCommerce environment

- Are proficient in QuickBooks Online (QBO certification is a plus)

- Understand COGS, inventory accounting, and payment processor reconciliations

- Are a self-starter who communicates proactively and meets deadlines without hand-holding

- CPA or CB 



Why Join Us



- 100% remote — work from anywhere

- Flexible schedule — we care about results, not hours logged

- High-autonomy culture with a collaborative, supportive team

- Stable, long-term engagement with room to grow



To apply, please answer these questions:

1. How many eCommerce businesses have you worked with in the past and what types of products did they sell?

2. For your highest-volume client, roughly how many transactions did you handle per month — and what was their approximate monthly revenue? If you handled multiple clients, feel free to share the range.

3. Do you have experience in assisting with tax prep (with a US accountant)

4. What makes you stay long term in a job?

5. Tell us about a time you caught or fixed a significant bookkeeping error. What happened and how did you handle it?

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian-based digital marketing and media agency. We produce high-quality creative assets for our clients across social media, advertising, branding, and digital campaigns. Design is central to everything we do — it shapes how our clients’ brands are perceived, and we take that seriously.



We are looking for a skilled freelance Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who can work with us on an ongoing basis. If you are someone who lives and breathes design, knows Adobe Photoshop inside out, and can produce polished, professional work consistently, we want to hear from you.



The Role



As a freelance Graphic Designer for AXIS Media Group, you will be creating a range of visual assets for client campaigns, social media, advertising, and brand projects. You will receive briefs through ClickUp, communicate with the team via Slack, and use Claude as an AI assistant to support your workflow where relevant. Your work will represent our clients publicly, so quality, consistency, and attention to detail are non-negotiable.



Software Requirements



You must have your own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Premiere Pro. This is a hard requirement — not optional. We do not provide software licences for freelance positions.



• Adobe Photoshop — expert level (primary tool for this role)

• Adobe Illustrator — strong proficiency for vector work and logos

• Adobe InDesign — for layouts, decks, and multi-page documents

• Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects — advantageous for motion/video assets

• Canva — for collaboration and quick assets. 

• ClickUp — for receiving project briefs, managing tasks, and tracking deliverables

• Slack — for day-to-day communication with the AXIS team

• Claude — AI assistant used to support workflow, research, and brief interpretation



Key Responsibilities



• Design social media graphics, ad creatives, banners, and digital assets to brief

• Produce brand-consistent visuals across multiple client accounts with varying style guides

• Retouch and manipulate photography and imagery to a high professional standard in Photoshop

• Create print-ready and web-ready files in the correct formats and resolutions

• Design marketing collateral including flyers, brochures, presentations, and one-pagers

• Receive and interpret creative briefs through ClickUp and deliver to agreed timelines

• Communicate proactively via Slack — flag questions early, provide progress updates, and meet deadlines

• Incorporate feedback promptly and professionally without compromising quality

• Maintain well-organised, clearly labelled file structures for handoff and archiving

• Use Claude as an assistant tool to support brief interpretation, copy suggestions, and ideation where relevant



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Expert-level Adobe Photoshop skills — this is the core tool for this role

• Own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• Strong graphic design fundamentals: typography, colour theory, layout, and composition

• Experience designing for digital platforms (social media, digital ads, web)

• A sharp eye for detail — you notice the small things that make design look polished

• Ability to work across multiple brand styles and adapt your aesthetic to suit each client

• Organised and reliable — you meet deadlines and communicate clearly when you cannot

• Comfortable working in English — reading briefs, communicating with the team, and understanding feedback

• Comfortable using ClickUp for task management and Slack for communication

• Willing to use Claude as a workflow assistant where prompted



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with motion graphics or video editing (After Effects or Premiere Pro)

• UI/UX or web design experience

• Experience working with Australian brands or agencies

• Social media content design experience (Reels covers, Stories, carousel posts, etc.)

• Brand identity and logo design experience



Who We Are Looking For



We want a designer who takes genuine pride in their craft. Someone who understands that a well-executed design is more than just visual — it communicates, persuades, and builds trust. If you find yourself noticing kerning issues on signs or instinctively reaching for Photoshop to fix a poorly cropped image, you’re our kind of person.

This is a freelance position, so you will need to be self-directed and reliable. We are not looking for someone who needs to be chased for updates. We want a professional who manages their own workload, communicates proactively, and consistently delivers work that makes our clients look great.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Your updated resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile

• A portfolio of your design work — links to examples or a PDF showcase (required)

• Confirmation that you have licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your design background and why you’re a great fit for this role

• Your availability and typical turnaround times

title: Personal Brand Content Manager & Video Editor
description:
We are hiring a Senior VA Content Operations Lead to manage and execute the founder’s personal brand content end-to-end. This role owns the content system—from planning and filming coordination to editing, publishing, and performance tracking.



This is a senior, ownership-driven VA role. You will act as the content operator and producer. The founder provides on-camera content and direction; you ensure content is consistently planned, edited, published, and optimized without constant oversight.



Approximately 90% of this role supports the founder’s personal brand. About 10% supports light agency content when needed.



Key Responsibilities

Content Ownership & Planning



Own the weekly and monthly content calendar.



Brainstorm and structure content ideas aligned with the founder’s brand and business.



Plan filming sessions and coordinate schedules with the founder and videographer.



Ensure consistent content output regardless of business workload.



Video Editing (Required)



Edit short-form video content for platforms such as Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.



Add captions, hooks, pacing, and light motion graphics.



Maintain a clean, professional, business-focused editing style.



Turn raw footage into publish-ready content efficiently.



Delegate overflow editing to additional editors when required.



Content Operations & Coordination



Assign editing tasks and manage deadlines.



Review all content for quality, clarity, and brand alignment.



Schedule and publish content across agreed platforms.



Track performance metrics and report on what content performs best.



Founder Coordination & Accountability



Schedule and protect filming blocks.



Prepare prompts or outlines prior to filming.



Keep filming sessions efficient and on schedule.



Follow up to ensure content commitments are met.



Light Agency Support (Approx. 10%)



Repurpose existing content for select agency clients when needed.



Support basic content planning or ad script mapping when requested.



What This Role Is Not



Not a junior VA or assistant role.



Not an influencer or trend-based content role.



Not a role that waits for daily instructions.



Not responsible for direct revenue or lead generation.



Success Metrics (First 60–90 Days)



Content is published weekly without reminders.



Editing quality is clean, consistent, and on-brand.



Founder spends minimal time managing content logistics.



Filming sessions run smoothly and predictably.



A content backlog exists so posting does not stop.



Required Experience & Skills



Proven experience managing and editing short-form content.



Experience supporting founder-led or business-focused brands.



Strong judgment and ability to make independent decisions.



Excellent organization and deadline management.



Comfortable owning outcomes, not just completing tasks.



Strong written and spoken English.



Important Note



This role requires ownership, initiative, and independent decision-making. Candidates who require constant direction or approval may not find this role to be a good fit.



Why This Role Exists (read carefully)



Our goal is consistency and leverage. If you are someone who enjoys building systems, taking ownership, and ensuring content gets shipped every week without being chased, this role will be a strong fit.

title: Social Media Manager - Ecommerce
description:

Role Overview

title: Admin/Scheduler (for pooling)
description:
Administrative and Scheduling Officer

We are seeking a proactive and organized Administrative and Scheduling Officer to join our team. This role is responsible for managing customer leads, scheduling appointments, handling inquiries, and providing excellent customer service. title: Mechanical Engineer
description:
About the Role:



We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Mechanical Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise in project management, design, and fabrication processes, with experience using ERP systems and design software. This role involves managing projects from quotation through completion, ensuring quality, accuracy, and compliance with client requirements.



Key Responsibilities:



• Prepare and review quotations for rotable and non-rotable items.

• Manage vendor quotations and oversee contract management.

• Process job cards using ERP software and link projects within the system.

• Review job details and requirements in alignment with purchase orders.

• Create fabrication drawings for client approval using Autodesk Inventor.

• Verify supplied drawings against purchase orders using AutoCAD, Adobe Reader, or Navisworks Manage.

• Develop project progress plans in Microsoft Project and update as needed.

• Participate in project kick-off meetings with workshop personnel.

• Process drawings, prepare DFT/DXF files, and create nesting using CNCad and Autonest.

• Generate project reports and compile final project documentation.

• Support job card issuance and monitor progress, ensuring timely updates to customers and managers.

• Prepare Inspection & Test Plans (ITPs), Manufacturing Data Records (MDRs), and Technical Review Forms (TRFs) when required.

• Issue collection notices and coordinate with customers.

• Conduct QA inspections for cast materials sourced internationally (e.g., China).

• Ensure mark-ups and drawing revisions are compliant with purchase orders.



Job Requirements:



• Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering or related field.

• Minimum 3 years of experience in mechanical design, fabrication, or project engineering.

• Proficiency in Autodesk Inventor, AutoCAD, Navisworks Manage, Microsoft Project, and other relevant tools.

• Familiarity with ERP systems.

• Strong knowledge of fabrication processes and project management principles.

• Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and communication skills.

• Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced team environment.



Responsibilities & Expectations:



• Ensure all job cards are processed accurately and fully compliant with client purchase orders.

• Maintain projects within budget and timelines.

• Deliver accurate fabrication drawings and secure necessary approvals.

• Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives within the engineering team.



How to Apply:



Please send your CV, portfolio, and a brief cover letter to:

title: Executive Shadow EA and Strategic Partner Direct Hire USA
description:
Job Title: Executive Shadow & Strategic Partner (Direct Hire | 100% NY EST Shift)

Focus: Operations, Follow-through, NYC Logistics, and CEO Support.



Role Overview:

I am a high-output CEO of a wellness company based in New York City. I'm looking for an Executive Shadow to act as my external brain and prevent me from being the bottleneck of the business. You will join my video meetings, chat throughout the day, capture my commitments, and ensure that neither my clients nor my team of designers and artists are ever waiting on me for a decision or a file.

Key Responsibilities (this will be shared with another VA working an overlapping shift):

-- Meeting Shadow: Join video calls and meetings by phone to capture action items and "to-dos" in real-time.

-- Calendar & Inbox Triage: Manage complex NYC scheduling and protect the CEO’s time.

-- Digital Librarian: Organize project photos, design ideas, and voice memos in Google Drive so the team has instant access.

-- Logistics Coordination: Work with our team to support the delivery and implementation of mindfulness programs and products citywide.

Requirements:

-- 3+ years of Executive Support (C-Suite level preferred).

-- Absolute Technical Resilience: Must have a high-capacity UPS/Power Station and Dual ISP (Primary Fiber + Backup).

--  Mindfulness Alignment: A calm, grounded, and detail-oriented professional presence.

-- Fluent English and US Cultural Fluency.

-- Experience with Google Workspace: Comfort using all Google Workspace Apps and programs, including Sheets, Slides, Keep, and Gemini. Talent using other AI platforms is a plus.



How to Apply: 

To be considered, please provide:

1. Your CV highlighting your experience as a "Right Hand" to a busy executive.

2. A short cover letter  IN YOUR OWN WORDS explaining your alignment with mindfulness.

3. The "Resilience Statement": Confirm your specific backup power and dual-internet hardware.

4. Bonus- A Video Intro: Tell us about your journey, hobbies, and vision for your future. 

*** Send
 to 
  with the Subject: "Your NYC Executive Shadow"

title: Technology Operations Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-time | US Pacific Time



What You Will Do



Keep the engine running. You are in charge of everything tech. When something breaks at 2am, you're the one who wakes up and fixes it (rare, but it happens).



Be the first responder. Phishing attempt? You lock it down, trace the damage, reset credentials, and brief the team on what happened. Vendor API breaks? You diagnose it, work with their support team, and get us back online. You solve problems.



Build things with AI. When someone on the team says "I wish we had a tool that does __________," you sit down and build a working version that afternoon. You do not need to be a software engineer, but you vibe code, test, and ship a functional internal tool.



Make smart technology decisions. You evaluate new technologies. You are learning, always, constantly, every day.



You will report directly to the president of the firm.



You will own all the problems and be the hero when you solve them.



To Apply



-Tell us about the last tech problem you solved. Be detailed.

-Look at our company, do some research, and tell us what you think you can do for a consulting firm like ours.

-Share LinkedIn or link to your resume.

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.

- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

We are a premier broker and growth partner for off-price retail, helping emerging CPG brands in beauty, wellness, food/beverage, and home categories scale across major retail chains. We are seeking an organized, process-driven coordinator to handle the execution layer of our sales and onboarding engine.



This is not a strategy or "hustle" role. We are looking for a reliable "task-finisher" who thrives on checklists and SOPs to ensure nothing falls through the cracks between a lead’s first reply and their successful onboarding as a client.



**Work Structure & Requirements**

**Location**: Remote.

**Timezone**: Must be available to work **US Eastern Standard Time (EST)** for real-time team coordination.

**Exclusivity**: This is a dedicated position; candidates **must not have a concurrent full-time job** to ensure responsiveness and reliability.

**Start Date**: April 2026.



**Key Responsibilities**



**1. Campaign Monitoring & Reply Management**

* Monitor outbound
 dashboards daily for replies and bounces.

* Categorize replies (Interested, Maybe, Not Interested) according to established SOPs.

* For interested leads: conduct brief brand research, create CRM entries, and coordinate call scheduling.

* Execute a rigorous follow-up cadence for interested leads who have not yet booked a call.

* Prepare detailed pre-call notes (brand context, retailer fit, talking points) for the leadership team.



**2. Contract Administration & Onboarding**

* Issue contracts via DocuSign within 24 hours of a successful sales call.

* Rigorously monitor and follow up on unsigned contracts at Day 3, 7, and 14.

* Handle pre-approved contract redlines independently and flag complex changes for review.

* Coordinate document collection for new brands, including tax forms, blank invoices, and vendor setup requirements.



**3. Logistics & CRM Maintenance**

**Sample Logistics**: Coordinate product shipments between brands and retail buyers, providing tracking information within 24 hours.

**Revenue Tracking**: Maintain a master tracker of active coverage fees and flag upcoming renewals 30+ days in advance.

**Data Hygiene**: Ensure all leads, calls, and outcomes are logged accurately in the CRM (Notion) and flag stale leads for review.

**LinkedIn Execution**: Perform manual outreach and connection requests based on provided templates.



**Experience & Requirements**

**Experience**: Previous experience in admin, sales operations, or VA support roles is preferred but not required.

**Soft Skills**: Extreme attention to detail and a preference for following documented processes over improvising.

* **Tech Savvy**: Ability to learn new software quickly. Training will be provided for our stack, which includes **Notion, Instantly, DocuSign, and Google Sheets**.

**Communication**: Strong written English for professional
 correspondence and internal reporting.



**What Success Looks Like (90 Days)**

**30 Days**: Fully independent in daily reply triage, CRM navigation, and call preparation.

**60 Days**: Managing the full campaign and contract workflow with zero dropped leads or delays in onboarding document collection.

**90 Days**: Owning the execution layer reliably so that the management team can focus on high-level growth and strategy.



**To Apply**

Please submit your resume along with a **Loom video** (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Video Editor
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian digital marketing and media production agency. We create high-quality content for a range of clients — from social media campaigns and brand videos to long-form content and digital advertising. We are a team that cares about the craft, not just the output. Every frame matters to us, and we want a Video Editor who feels the same way.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Video Editor based in the Philippines to join our remote team on a full-time basis. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow alongside a creative agency and become a genuine part of the team.



The Role



As our Video Editor, you will work on a variety of content projects — social media short-form clips, brand videos, testimonials, ad creatives, and more. Your primary tool is DaVinci Resolve, and you need to know it deeply: colour grading, audio mixing, multi-cam editing, transitions, text animations, and exports. You will collaborate closely with our Australian team, attend regular video check-ins, and bring a strong sense of visual storytelling to everything you produce.



What We Provide



We set our editors up for success. You will receive access to Higgsfield AI for enhanced video production, free mentoring calls with senior team members, ready-to-use assets and templates, and ongoing support to develop your skills. We invest in the people we work with.



• Access to Higgsfield AI — provided by AXIS for your productions

• Regular one-on-one and group mentoring calls at no cost to you

• Pre-built asset libraries, templates, and motion resources

• Clear briefs and a structured workflow so you always know what is expected

• A collaborative, feedback-driven team environment where your craft is respected



Key Responsibilities



• Edit short-form and long-form video content to a high professional standard using DaVinci Resolve

• Colour grade footage to match brand look and feel, or as directed

• Mix and clean audio tracks including voiceover, music, and ambient sound

• Create and apply motion graphics, text animations, and lower thirds within DaVinci Resolve

• Export and deliver files to the correct specs for each platform (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, web, etc.)

• Attend virtual team meetings on Mondays and Wednesdays, with availability for Friday check-ins as required

• Collaborate via Slack for day-to-day communication and updates

• Manage and organise project files within Google Drive and ClickUp

• Use Claude (AI assistant) as directed to support workflows and efficiency

• Take creative direction, incorporate feedback, and revise work in a timely manner

• Maintain consistent output quality across multiple concurrent projects



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Minimum 2–3 years of professional video editing experience

• Expert-level proficiency in DaVinci Resolve — you must hold the paid (Studio) version

• Strong understanding of colour grading, audio mixing, and post-production workflow

• A genuine passion for the craft of editing — you understand pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

• Full-time availability — you are dedicated to this role and not juggling multiple full-time commitments

• Reliable internet connection and a capable editing workstation

• Comfortable working in English — written and spoken communication with the Australian team

• Familiarity with ClickUp for task and project management

• Familiarity with Slack for team communication

• Working knowledge of Google Drive for file storage and sharing

• Basic familiarity with Claude (AI assistant) or willingness to learn



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with Higgsfield AI or similar AI-assisted video tools

• Motion graphics experience in Fusion (built into DaVinci Resolve)

• Experience editing for Australian or Western-market brands

• Photography or cinematography background

• Short-form social media content editing experience (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)



Team Structure & Meetings



You will work closely with the AXIS team and be a genuine part of our production workflow. We run structured team check-ins twice a week on Mondays and Wednesdays, with an optional third session on Fridays when project load requires it. These are short, focused meetings — not lengthy sit-ins. We use these to align on priorities, share feedback, and keep projects moving.

Outside of meetings, the team communicates through Slack. We expect you to be responsive during working hours, take creative feedback constructively, and flag any issues early. We are a collaborative team that respects each other’s time and expertise.



Pay Structure



Editing projects are paid at a rate of AUD $30–$80 per video, based on the complexity, length, and requirements of each edit. More involved projects requiring colour grading, motion graphics, and multi-track audio are compensated at the higher end of the range. Clear briefs will always outline the expected scope before work begins.

We value quality over speed, and we price accordingly. If you are the right fit and your work consistently delivers, there is real potential for long-term, ongoing work with increasing volume.



Who We Are Looking For



We are not looking for a button-pusher. We want someone who loves editing — who thinks about why a cut works, who cares about how audio feels, and who sees the difference between a mediocre video and a great one. If you have been editing for years and still feel excited when a project comes together, you are the kind of person we want.

You need to be reliable, self-managed, and comfortable working asynchronously with an Australian team. You take feedback well, communicate clearly, and approach your work with professionalism and pride.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Your updated resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile

• A showreel or portfolio of video work — links to edited videos you have produced (required)

• Confirmation that you use DaVinci Resolve Studio (paid version)

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your editing background and why this role interests you

• Your typical working hours and availability



Applications without a portfolio or showreel will not be considered.



We look forward to seeing your work.



— The AXIS Media Group Team

title: Head of Growth and Acquisition (SaaS Company)
description:
Job Title: Head of Growth (SaaS)



Company: Vertex360 Software

Location: Remote (Australia-based company)



PLEASE READ THE INFORMATION BELOW THOROUGHLY. 



Role Overview



The Head of Growth will be responsible for driving revenue growth, improving sales performance, and strengthening the end-to-end client journey across the sales and after-sales functions at Vertex360. This role focuses on analysing performance data, optimising sales processes, coaching tea
mbers, and improving conversion outcomes to support the continued expansion of Vertex360 Software.



Working closely with Sales, Account Managers, and leadership, the Head of Growth will ensure that new clients experience a seamless onboarding and transition process while building scalable frameworks that support long-term client success and retention.



Key Responsibilities



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales Performance Analysis and Optimisation

Monitor and analyse overall sales performance across the team, identifying trends, bottlenecks, and opportunities to improve pipeline efficiency, conversion rates, and revenue outcomes.



2. Market Research and Opportunity Identification

Conduct ongoing market research to understand industry trends, customer behaviour, and competitor positioning. Identify client pain points, market gaps, and areas for improvement to strengthen the company’s market positioning.



3. Revenue Growth Strategy

Develop and implement strategic initiatives aimed at driving sustainable revenue growth, improving client acquisition, and maximising sales opportunities.



4. Team Performance Coaching

Lead twice-weekly performance optimisation sessions (Wednesdays and Fridays), providing structured coaching, feedback, and strategic guidance to sales tea
mbers to strengthen individual performance and overall team results.



5. Sales and After-Sales Capability Development

Facilitate a weekly 30-minute capability-building session designed to strengthen both sales and after-sales functions for the Sales Team and Account Managers, sharing best practices, sales strategies, and customer success insights.



6. Account Manager Onboarding Oversight

Oversee Account Manager onboarding sessions to ensure attendance and preparedness, confirming presence at least five minutes prior to each session. Serve as a reliable backup facilitator when necessary to ensure a consistent and professional client experience.



7. Pipeline and Conversion Improvement

Develop and implement strategies to reduce No-Show and Reschedule rates, improving engagement, protecting the sales pipeline, and maximising conversion opportunities.



8. Sales to Account Management Transition

Monitor and optimise the transition from Sales to Account Managers to ensure smooth handovers, clear client expectations, and a high standard of customer experience throughout the onboarding process.



9. Process and Framework Development

Strengthen sales and after-sales frameworks through continuous training, process improvements, and structured playbooks that support scalable growth and long-term client relationships.



10. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with leadership, sales, marketing, and customer success teams to identify operational improvements and implement growth strategies aligned with Vertex360’s business objectives.



Qualifications and Experience



Minimum of 7+ years of experience in Business Management, Growth, Sales Leadership, or related roles



Experience working in a SaaS environment is highly preferred



NDIS industry experience is an advantage



Proven experience in leading and mentoring high-performing teams



Demonstrated ability to drive business growth and significantly contribute to company expansion



Strong analytical, leadership, and strategic thinking skills



Excellent communication, coaching, and stakeholder management abilities



Compensation and Benefits



Monthly Salary: PHP 50,000 – 70,000 , depending on qualifications and interview outcomes



Performance-Based Commission tied to growth and performance metrics



Opportunity to work with a fast-growing SaaS company supporting the NDIS sector in Australia

title: SEO Specialist | Local SEO | SEO Content Writing
description:
About this role



SEO Specialist — Home Services



Nexta Talent is sourcing an SEO Specialist for clients in the home services industry — movers, HVAC contractors, plumbers, roofers, landscapers, and similar local service businesses. This is a local-SEO-focused writing role where every piece you produce is built to drive leads from local search, not just to read. You will work from structured content briefs, apply local SEO and entity-based optimization principles, and deliver content that ranks in target service areas.



Key Responsibilities



Write SEO-optimized content across multiple formats: location/service pages, blog posts, press releases, guest posts, and content refreshes

Build location-specific service pages targeting "[service] in [city]" patterns with unique, locally-relevant content

Optimize on-page elements — title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, URL slugs — for local search intent

Apply local SEO principles: NAP consistency, service-area targeting, geo-modified keyword clusters, and entity optimization

Develop internal linking strategies connecting service pages, location pages, and supporting blog content

Audit and refresh existing content to improve declining rankings and prevent cannibalization

Achieve minimum content optimization scores (e.g., Surfer SEO 70+) on all deliverables



Required Qualifications



2+ years writing SEO-optimized content, preferably for local businesses or home service companies

Solid grasp of local SEO: location pages, service-area targeting, GBP content, local keyword research

On-page SEO proficiency: title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, schema markup awareness

Experience with keyword research and clustering for location-based and service-based terms

Proficiency with at least 2 SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, Surfer SEO, Clearscope, Frase, or MarketMuse)

Portfolio of published SEO content with evidence of ranking performance



Preferred Qualifications



Direct experience writing for home service companies (movers, HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping, etc.)

Experience with entity-based SEO and local knowledge graph optimization

Background in content auditing — cannibalization detection, content gaps, refresh strategies

Understanding of the home services buyer journey and writing content that converts local searchers



Quality Standards



All deliverables must pass originality checks (Copyscape/Originality.ai)

Blog posts must achieve 70+ Surfer/Clearscope content score

Location pages must contain unique, locally-relevant content — no thin doorway pages

Max 2 revision rounds per deliverable; pieces failing quality gates after revisions are rejected



Growth Opportunity



Top performers who consistently deliver high-quality work and demonstrate strategic thinking beyond content execution will be considered for advancement into a full-time strategic role — leading content strategy, managing client accounts, and shaping SEO direction across our portfolio of home service clients.



Requirements



Required:



2+ years writing SEO-optimized content, preferably for local businesses or home service companies

Understanding of local SEO fundamentals: location pages, service-area targeting, Google Business Profile content, local keyword research

Demonstrated knowledge of on-page SEO: title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, schema markup awareness

Experience with keyword research and clustering for location-based and service-based terms

Working knowledge of internal linking strategy and site architecture for multi-location service businesses

Proficiency with at least 2 SEO tools: Ahrefs, Semrush, Surfer SEO, Clearscope, Frase, or MarketMuse

Strong written English with ability to write persuasive, conversion-focused copy for service businesses

Portfolio of published SEO content with evidence of ranking performance



Preferred:



Direct experience writing for home service companies (movers, HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping, pest control, etc.)

Experience with entity-based SEO and local knowledge graph optimization

Familiarity with LocalBusiness schema markup (JSON-LD)

Background in content auditing — cannibalization detection across location pages, content gaps, refresh strategies

Experience writing press releases for local businesses

Understanding of the home services buyer journey and how to write content that converts local searchers



HOW TO APPLY:



We use a structured screening process to ensure the best fit. To be considered, submit your application with a short cover letter and screening responses at www. applynexta.online

3–5 years of experience in lighting design and electrical estimating.



Strong knowledge of lighting applications and electrical standards (Australia/New Zealand).

title: Business Operations & Systems Organiser (Full-Time | Build Systems)
description:
JOB TITLE

Business Operations & Systems Organiser (Full-Time | Build Systems, Own Financial Tracking)



---



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are hiring a Business Operations and Systems Organiser to join a growing Australian operation on a full-time, long-term basis.



This role is about building the financial and operational backbone of the business. You will create and maintain systems that track income, expenses, and cash position across dozens of accounts, reconcile transactions in Xero, produce weekly financial summaries for the operator, and help keep the business organised day to day. The systems do not exist yet - you will be designing and building them with direction from the operator.



If you have worked in finance admin, bookkeeping, data operations, e-commerce operations, or any role where tracking numbers and building reports was a regular part of your work - and you are genuinely comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter - we want to hear from you.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time role, 40 hours per week

* Stable, long-term position with an Australian business

* PHP 33,500 starting salary, increasing to PHP 35,000 after probation

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Fully remote - work from home



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Build and maintain expense tracking systems linked to individual accounts, so the operator can see at any time what each account has cost and what it has returned

* Track total funds across accounts and pending withdrawal positions

* Reconcile Xero accounts and keep bookkeeping up to date on a regular cadence

* Produce weekly financial summaries covering balances, expenses, profit per account, and account purchasing rate versus profit

* Flag anomalies in the numbers before they become problems

* Take the lead on designing solutions when new tracking needs arise - ask the right questions, then go and build it

* Help the operator stay organised day to day - following up on pending items and keeping things moving

* Some coordination with a second VA on the execution side where workflows connect



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Genuinely comfortable with numbers - able to spot when something does not add up and work confidently with financial data

* Strong with spreadsheets - Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar; able to build structured tracking systems without hand-holding

* Comfortable with Xero or genuinely confident in learning it quickly

* Proactive - moves without being chased, asks questions when needed, and flags issues early

* Strong written English - produces clear, accurate summaries and reports

* Actively uses AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) as a regular part of how you work - not just occasionally

* Comfortable working in an environment where the systems are still being built and the brief is not always fully defined upfront

* Reliable computer and internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Familiarity with Airtable (building views, formulas, linked records)

* Experience building operational dashboards or reporting systems

* Background in e-commerce, trading, finance admin, or any data-driven business



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Monday to Friday

* Australian daytime hours (AEST/AEDT) - target 10am to 6pm AEST



---



If you are someone who finds it natural to look at a messy financial picture and build something that makes it clear - and you are ready to do that work independently in a fast-moving Australian operation - apply now.

title: Associate Client Success Manager
description:
About Propseller



In 2024, Propseller has been ranked #1 Fastest-Growing Real Estate Company in APAC by the Financial Times and #10 in Singapore’s fastest-growing companies 2024 by The Straits Times and Statista.

In August 2022, Propseller raised a US$12M Series A led by Vertex Ventures, the VC arm of Temasek, the investment company owned by the Government of Singapore and the Series A lead investor of Grab.



Propseller’s mission is to help people build wealth with real estate. We’re building an end-to-end real estate transaction platform and towards that goal, we started the journey by building a technology-powered real estate brokerage that is valuable, reliable and fairly priced. 



By elevating the most human part of the service with top in-house agents and industrialising all the rest with technology and centralised operations, we became Singapore's most loved real estate agent with an average Google My Business rating of 4.8/5 (800+ reviews). 



The next phase of the journey is to go from helping people sell their homes to becoming the No. 1 brand for people to move from one home to the next: sell, buy, and finance.



Find out more at: 
/careers/



Role Description



Associate Client Success Managers act as strategic and supportive partners to both property owners and buyers, ensuring an elite end-to-end client experience. You will work closely with top-performing Real Estate Consultants and internal experts to support clients at every stage of their journey. This includes smooth onboarding, scheduling property photo shoot and video shoot, creating beautiful property listings, helping buyers find their dream homes, coordinating viewings, and driving successful closings.



This is a hybrid role that blends client advisory, operational execution, and cross-functional collaboration. You will play a critical role in showcasing properties at their best, managing client expectations, and improving the speed and quality of each transaction. Whether supporting a homeowner selling a $500K unit or assisting a buyer searching for a $20M landed house, your contribution will directly impact satisfaction, conversion, and overall performance.



If you are motivated by service excellence, focused on execution, and passionate about making clients successful and happy, this role is for you.



Duties & Responsibilities



Deliver a Seamless and Elevated Client Journey



- Onboard Clients with Clarity and Care: Guide property owners and buyers through a structured and reassuring onboarding experience, laying the foundation for a premium and professional collaboration.

- Be the Client’s Trusted Partner: Maintain proactive communication, provide regular updates, and ensure every client feels supported and in control throughout their journey, from onboarding to closing.

- Maximise Client Satisfaction: Champion service excellence at every step, helping ensure that each interaction reinforces Propseller’s reputation for care, trust, and performance.



Orchestrate High-Quality Listing and Marketing Execution



- Oversee Listing Launches: Ensure each listing is activated with precision, by coordinating timelines and validating high-quality marketing assets, from compelling descriptions to polished visuals.

- Coordinate Marketing & Staging: Align photoshoot, staging, and advertising initiatives to showcase each property at its best and attract the right buyers.

- Drive Visibility Through Advertising Coordination: Support the execution of strategic ad campaigns to maximise visibility and generate strong buyer interest.



Support Buyer Search and Property Shortlisting



- Refine Search Criteria: Review and clarify the search criteria submitted by buyers to ensure alignment with their needs and expectations.

- Search and Shortlist Listings: Explore multiple property portals, confirm key details, and compile a tailored shortlist of relevant and available listings.

- Ensure Listing Relevance and Accuracy: Double-check listing availability and specifications to ensure every option shared is a realistic and high-quality fit.



Coordinate Viewings and Drive Performance



- Optimise Viewing Scheduling: Manage availability and logistics across clients, agents, and internal teams to ensure a high number of property viewings for each listing.

- Monitor Progress & Maintain 
ntum: Schedule strategic checkpoint calls and surface key performance insights to keep clients engaged and focused on results.

- Collaborate Across Functions: Act as the central link between Real Estate Consultants, marketing, and operations to ensure a seamless and high-performing client journey.



Ideal Candidate



You are sharp, proactive, and naturally earn trust. You thrive in fast-paced, client-facing environments where communication, organisation, and empathy are everything. You don’t just handle tasks, you anticipate needs, build genuine relationships, and turn challenges into opportunities.



With experience in roles like Client Success, Customer Service, Sales, or Marketing, you have learned how to read people, solve problems, and make things happen. You are not just looking for a job, you are looking to make a real impact and be part of a company reshaping the real estate experience from the ground up.



Requirements



- Education: Diploma or Bachelor degree required;

- Experience: 1 year experience required in a remote customer service role;

- Language Proficiency: Strong written and verbal communication skills in English;

- Technical Skills: Proficient in Google Suite and MS Office, with strong overall computer skills;

- Exceptional Communication Skills: You have a natural ability to connect with diverse clientele, adapting your communication style to build rapport and ensure clear, effective interactions;

- Organised and Multi-Tasking: You excel at time management and prioritising tasks, consistently completing work efficiently and on schedule;

- Fast and Detail-Oriented: With a meticulous eye for detail, you review your work carefully to ensure high quality while maintaining a quick turnaround;

- Client-Centric Approach: You genuinely enjoy interacting with clients and are dedicated to making Propseller clients successful through attentive, supportive service;

- Resilient and Persistent: You demonstrate resilience when facing challenges or pushback and have the determination to see tasks through to completion;

- Adaptable: You adapt with ease when things evolve. You stay focused and effective in every circumstance.



You Get



- Remote: Deliver output from the comfort of your home while contributing directly to a fast-growing, tech-enabled real estate company based in Singapore.

- Structured support & training: Get onboarded with clear guidance, regular check-ins, and ongoing coaching to help you thrive

- Performance-based bonus: Be rewarded directly for your results

- Above-market compensation: Receive competitive pay that reflects your skills and performance, significantly higher than local customer service contracts

- Exposure to startup culture: Join a high-performing and caring team that values initiative, learning, and collaboration, without the rigid structure of corporate environments

- Purpose & impact: Play a meaningful role in shaping the home-buying and selling experience of clients in one of life’s biggest milestones



Recruiting Process



Ideal length: 1 week



1. Online Test (30min) 

2. Screening - Online (30min) - Introductory Call with Talent Acquisition Associate

3. Interview (1h) - Meeting with Success and Service Manager (role play)

4. DILO - Online (1 Full day) - Day-in-the-life with training and job simulation (paid DILO) - Meet with Co-founder / CPO

5. Welcome Aboard! 



Compensation



- $5 per hour

- Monthly performance-based bonus of up to $100

title: Creative Strategist
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





Creative Strategist Full-Time (UMAEZ Ltd)



We’re hiring a data-obsessed Creative Strategist with 3+ years of experience who thrives in a high-velocity testing environment (20–30 concepts weekly) to unlock and scale profitable ad spend on cold traffic across our DTC portfolio.



Please do not apply if you don’t have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting.



Compensation: Competitive base salary + performance-based commissions (top performers can reach five figures during the trial period)



Location: Remote (Full-Time)

Schedule: Monday–Friday 



About US



Our company operates a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across both US and SEA markets. We run a structured, data-driven creative system where testing velocity and iteration discipline directly determine growth.



Advantage: You’ll get a chance to have hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands within our portfolio and learn how creative strategy differs between US and SEA markets (audience psychology, formats, offers, and scaling patterns).



What You’ll Do



Research & Concept Development

-Conduct deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts

-Study competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology (mass desire & market awareness), and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities

-Develop 20–30 net-new concepts tested weekly (minimum) to maintain velocity and uncover winners for the brand (s)  assigned to you



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

-Write compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold audiences and convert them into buyers

-Produce clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers to ensure rapid alignment and execution

-Own the creative pipeline for assigned offers, driving the process from research ? ideation to scripting ? post-launch performance analysis



Collaboration & Iteration (Creative Engine)

-Work closely with our Lead Strategists on the higher strategic level and with editors and designers on the execution level to bring concepts to life at a high standard

-Collaborate with growth/media teams to iterate based on performance feedback and improve ROI

-Leverage proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing

-Feed insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

-Analyze winners and losers weekly and document your learnings

-Rapidly iterate winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

-Maintain a consistent pipeline of fresh creatives to reduce fatigue and sustain conversion



Required Qualifications

-Direct response expertise: Strong bias toward testing, iteration, and measurable results; understands how to profitably convert cold traffic

-Proven copywriting skills: Ability to write persuasive hooks and scripts (regular video ads, static ads or UGC ads) for Meta/TikTok/ in the DR advertising field

-Obsessive researcher: Strong at competitor intel, consumer psychology, awareness stages, and mechanism-driven angles

-Fast learner & hungry: Can absorb frameworks quickly and thrive under high output expectations

-A Player mentality (Resilience + ownership): Comfortable with rapid feedback cycles and treating assigned offers like a business unit



Success Looks Like (Core KPIs)

-High volume output: Consistently launching 20–30 net-new concepts/week (minimum)

-Creative hit rate: Achieving 10%+ hit rate (winners that validate and scale)



Why Join Us?

-Work on 7–8 figure brands across US or SEA markets

-Performance-based upside: Base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

-High ownership: Your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth ceilings

-Rapid learning environment: Proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

-Real career growth: Clear path to take on larger scope, priority brands, or lead responsibilities



Why You Shouldn’t Apply

-You want to coast or spend weeks polishing one campaign this role requires speed, iteration, and high quality output

-You struggle with high volume requirements, following operational workflows or processes, or fast feedback cycles

-You’re uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins

-You need step-by-step hand-holding or don’t like ownership

-You’re balancing multiple jobs or clients this requires full-time dedicated ownership



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: IT Automation Specialist  - Shopify Inventory & Orders
description:
Inventory & Customer Support Automation Specialist



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced automation and systems specialist to design, implement, and optimise an end-to-end operations and support system for our ecommerce business. The focus is on:

Bespoke order management & weekly restock automation

Centralised customer enquiry management with automation

The ideal candidate will create a scalable, automated solution that reduces manual work, eliminates errors, improves customer experience, and provides real-time visibility across orders, stock, and support requests.



Key Responsibilities

1. Bespoke Order & Inventory Automation

Automate extraction and batching of bespoke orders per factory (5-week and 12-week production cycles)

Design a universal SKU system for all product variants

Implement weekly restock recommendations based on inventory levels, sales velocity, and lead times

Generate automated factory sheets (Google Sheets or equivalent)

Integrate with Shopify, Airtable, and relevant factory workflows

Set up dashboards for tracking orders, production, and stock



2. Customer Enquiry Automation & Support System

Implement a centralised helpdesk system (e.g., Gorgias or Zendesk)

Integrate all channels:
, web forms, and social media

Automate responses for common enquiries: returns, order status, lost packages

Build macros, templates, and rules to reduce manual handling

Integrate Shopify customer data for contextual support

Design reporting dashboards to track ticket volume, response times, and resolution rates



3. System Integration & Automation

Automate workflows across Airtable, Shopify, Zapier/Make, Google Sheets, and Klaviyo

Ensure bespoke orders, restock orders, and customer enquiries feed into a single centralised system

Set up triggers, notifications, and alerts to prevent bottlenecks or missed actions



4. Testing, Documentation, & Training

Conduct end-to-end testing for bespoke orders, restock calculations, and enquiry automation

Provide SOPs, user guides, and training for internal staff

Ensure scalability for growth



Deliverables

Fully automated bespoke order and weekly restock system

Centralised customer enquiry management system with automated responses

Factory-ready sheets for production

Central dashboard tracking inventory, orders, and enquiries

SOPs and training materials



Success Criteria

Reduction of manual bespoke order handling by ?80%

Accurate weekly restock recommendations with minimal human intervention

Centralised customer enquiry system handling ?80% of repetitive tickets automatically

Faster response times (<24 hours on average)

No lost or duplicated tickets or orders

Scalable, growth-ready system



Required Experience & Skills

Systems & Automation: Airtable, Zapier or Make, Google Sheets

Ecommerce Platforms: Shopify or equivalent

Customer Support Automation: Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar

 Automation: Klaviyo or similar

Inventory management and SKU structuring

Workflow design and process optimisation

Ability to integrate multiple platforms into a single centralised system

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience

Experience with bespoke / made-to-order workflows

Experience with returns and order tracking automation

Supply chain or manufacturing systems familiarity

Reporting and dashboard creation for operational KPIs



Key Traits

Detail-oriented and systems thinker

Able to translate business requirements into automated workflows

Clear communicator, capable of training internal staff

Comfortable working with multiple stakeholders (operations, customer service, factories)



Engagement Type

Freelance / Contract (project-based)

Estimated duration: 4 weeks for implementation

Potential for ongoing optimisation support



Optional Screening Questions

Describe a system you built to automate order batching or inventory management.

How would you design a weekly restock recommendation system based on sales and lead times?

Have you integrated a customer support platform with Shopify and automated responses?

Explain how you would unify multiple communication channels into a single helpdesk system.

How do you prevent errors in bespoke or restock order workflows?

We are a US based e-commerce company, selling water filtration and plumbing supplies, looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations VA to support daily execution across customer service, admin, and ecommerce operations.

This is a real-time, execution-focused role. You will be working live during US business hours, handling tasks as they come in, and ensuring operations run smoothly throughout the day.

, chat, and basic phone answering/routing)

description:

Data Entry & Data Management

Transfer data fro
dical/source documents into electronic systems

Required Qualifications

Knowledge of GCP or regulatory standards

Why Join Jiva Health?

If you are highly detail-oriented, dependable, and interested in healthcare or clinical research, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply today and grow with us at Jiva Health.

title: tiktok video editor
description:
Editing VA hiring post:



Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300 + bonuses for 3-4h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video:



Google drive: 





Please complete the following steps:



Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

Message me a link to re-create video



Overlay

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

Pay attention to overlay position and length

Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

Message me a link to re-create video



Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “beetroot”

Core Role

/Instagram) campaigns

 What We Provide

 Compensation
