title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Join Our Team as a Video Editor – Bring Stories to Life with Us!



Are you an expert in video editing with a passion for creating dynamic, impactful content? Do you have the skills to bring stories to life with your editing style, and are you looking for an opportunity to work in a fast-paced, creative environment? At Uniworld Omniport, we're on the hunt for a dynamic and driven Video Editor to join our growing team.



The ideal candidate is someone with a successful track record of building social content for a brand and has experience in successfully growing a brand’s social media presence. If you have a proven ability to craft compelling narratives through video and are up-to-date with the latest editing techniques, we’d love to hear from you!



About Us

Founded in 2006, Uniworld Omniport is a direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce company that owns and operates two industry-leading brands: BBO Poker Tables and Game Theory Tables. Based at the Speedway in North East Las Vegas, our global presence connects tea
mbers from around the world, united by our mission to "create unforgettable memories between friends and family." At the core of our internal culture are trust and accountability, values that are evident in the actions of our tea
mbers.



Why This Role Matters:

This isn’t measured just by the quality of the content you create, but by the impact it has on our brand and audience. As a Video Editor at BBO Poker Tables and Game Theory Tables, you’ll contribute to the bigger picture—driving customer engagement, enhancing our brand image, and fostering team collaboration. You’ll be at the forefront of creating videos that not only capture attention but also deliver tangible results.



The Perfect Video Editor We Need:

- Expertise in Key Software: Highly proficient in Adobe After Effects and/or Adobe Premiere with a solid understanding of Adobe Photoshop.

- Content Creation Mastery: Proven ability to create dynamic, high-quality videos that resonate with audiences and align with our brand image.

- Engagement-Driven: Focused on achieving and maintaining high levels of engagement across all platforms—social media, websites, and more. You’ll help elevate our content performance to the next level.

- KPI-Oriented: You’re results-driven and have experience managing performance metrics, consistently meeting or exceeding KPIs related to content engagement, social media performance, and website traffic.

- Collaborative Spirit: Able to seamlessly work with various tea
mbers to deliver content that aligns with a unified brand message and resonates with our target audience.

- Continuous Growth: Eager to learn and develop new skills, improving efficiency and mastering new tools and techniques.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently produce captivating videos that resonate with our audience and align with our brand’s vision.

- Drive higher levels of interaction across social media and digital platforms, helping to boost views, shares, and brand awareness.

- Bring fresh ideas and creative solutions to the table, enhancing teamwork and contributing to a stronger, more unified creative process.



Why Work With Us?

- Creative Environment: You’ll have the opportunity to work on a variety of exciting projects that allow you to showcase your creativity and skills.

- Growth Opportunities: We believe in fostering personal and professional growth, offering training and development to help you expand your skill set.

- Supportive Team: Join a talented, collaborative team that values creativity and innovation.

- Flexible Work Environment: We offer flexible work options to support work-life balance.

- Competitive Pay & Benefits: We offer a competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.



Deliverables

How Success is Measured in This Role:

In this Video Editor role, success is defined by your ability to create powerful, visually engaging content that drives results and strengthens our brand. Here's what success looks like:

- Bring Still Images to Life: Use Adobe After Effects, Photoshop, and Illustrator to transform static images into dynamic, attention-grabbing animated ads.

- Video Editing & Motion Graphics: Take raw video footage and craft compelling narratives that speak to our audience. Combine video editing with motion graphics to produce engaging social media content and advertisements.

- Motion Graphics Design Expertise: Create stunning motion graphics that enhance video content, using your design skills to add visual appeal and depth to advertisements, social media posts, and promotional videos.

- Animate Static Assets: Transform still images and logos into dynamic animated visuals, elevating the storytelling experience and ensuring content stands out across multiple platforms.

- Graphic Design Mastery: Create visually compelling static graphics, including social media posts, website assets, and
 templates that align with our brand’s voice and aesthetic.

- Design Integration: Combine graphic design with video editing to create cohesive content, ensuring that all visual elements complement each other and enhance the storytelling experience.

- Adapt Content for Multiple Platforms: Re-edit video content into different aspect ratios for various platforms, ensuring optimal presentation and engagement.

- Collaborate with the Team: Work closely with the creative team and stakeholders to ensure your video content aligns with the brand strategy and meets project goals.

- Create Visual Masterpieces: Resize, cut out, and composite images to create eye-catching graphics that complement your video content.

- Maintain Quality: Ensure that all animations and video content are on-brand, visually appealing, and adhere to the highest standards.

- Meet Deadlines & Deliver on Expectations: Take ownership of project timelines and ensure your content is delivered on time, meeting or exceeding expectations.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently produce captivating videos that resonate with our audience and align with our brand’s vision.

- Drive higher levels of interaction across social media and digital platforms, helping to boost views, shares, and brand awareness.

- Bring fresh ideas and creative solutions to the table, enhancing teamwork and contributing to a stronger, more unified creative process.

title: Offshore Project Manager / Account Executive (Philippines-Based)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing, U.S.-based marketing communications agency serving a diverse portfolio of clients across industries including energy, technology, defense, and beyond. Our work spans creative services, paid media, and digital strategy, and we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, forward-thinking solutions to our clients.



About the Role



We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented Project Manager / Account Executive based in the Philippines to support and oversee the execution of marketing and communications projects across multiple disciplines.



This role is ideal for someone who is naturally curious, proactive, and thrives in a fast-paced environment. Success in this position comes from thinking ahead, asking the right questions, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



You will serve as a key liaison between internal teams (creative, media, production) and external stakeholders, ensuring projects are delivered on time, on budget, and at a high standard.



Key Responsibilities

 • Manage and coordinate projects across creative services, paid media, and production

 • Act as a central point of contact between internal teams and U.S.-based clients

 • Track timelines, deliverables, and project milestones to ensure smooth execution

 • Proactively identify risks, gaps, or potential issues—and solve them before they arise

 • Ask thoughtful questions and validate assumptions to ensure clarity and alignment

 • Review work for accuracy, completeness, and quality before delivery

 • Anticipate next steps and needs 2–3 stages ahead in the project lifecycle

 • Maintain organized documentation and communication across all projects



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong critical thinking and exceptional common sense

 • Highly inquisitive mindset—you naturally question, verify, and double-check

 • Ability to think ahead and anticipate problems before they happen

 • Excellent organizational and time management skills

 • Strong written and verbal English communication skills

 • Confidence interfacing with American clients in a professional setting

 • High level of accountability and ownership



Preferred (Not Required)

 • Experience in marketing, advertising, or communications

 • Familiarity with:

 • Paid media and programmatic advertising

 • Social media marketing

 • Digital marketing and online campaigns

 • SEO (Search Engine Optimization)

 • Background in customer service or client-facing roles (transferable skills welcomed)



Why This Role Matters



This is not a task-based project management role—it’s a thinking role. The right candidate will act as a strategic partner who ensures projects run smoothly by staying ahead, asking the right questions, and connecting the dots across teams.



Compensation

 • Competitive pay based on experience

 • Opportunity to grow within a dynamic, international agency environment



How to Apply



Please submit your resume along with a brief note explaining:

 • Why you’re a strong fit for this role

 • An example of how you anticipated and prevented a problem in a previous role



We’re looking for someone who doesn’t just manage projects—but thinks, anticipates, and elevates everything they touch.

title: Creative Media Specialist
description:
We need someone who can produce content, make it look sharp, and keep it moving every single day.

If you like ownership, speed, and real output, keep reading.



What You’ll Do

You will create and manage content across all SO Good social platforms.

This includes:

-Edit short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style content)

-Design graphics for posts, announcements, and campaigns

-Edit podcasts using AutoPod or Riverside

-Create thumbnails and cover graphics

-Upload and schedule content using Metricool

-Keep content organized inside Google Drive

-Execute tasks from Trello and marketing meetings

You are not guessing what to do.

You are executing at a high level



What Winning Looks Like

-Content is produced consistently

-Turnaround is fast (24–48 hours max)

-Quality is strong and improving

-Minimal revisions needed

-Communication is tight and responsive

Over time, you should be able to run directly with the Growth Marketing Coordinator without hand-holding.



Work Style

-Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central

-You are available on Google Chat during work hours

-You attend marketing meetings and weekly one-on-ones

-You respond fast and communicate clearly



Tools You’ll Use (Company Subscriptions)

-Adobe Premiere Pro (AutoPod)

-After Effects

-Photoshop

-Illustrator

-Canva

-CapCut

-Metricool

-Google Drive

-Trello

If you don’t already use most of these, this is not for you.



Creative Standard

Our content is:

-Bold

-Loud

-Attention-grabbing

-Clean and professional

If your work looks safe or boring, it won’t work here.



Expectations

-24–48 hour turnaround on assigned work

-Multiple reels per day when needed

-Graphics within 24 hours

-Podcasts edited in ~4 hours (when using AutoPod)

-Typically under 2 revisions per piece

We value speed and quality. Not one without the other.



Non-Negotiables

-Strong communication

-Fast turnaround

-Ability to follow direction

-No second job

-Organized file management

If you disappear, miss deadlines, or need constant revisions, this will not work.



How to Apply

We don’t hire off resumes alone.

You must submit:

-Portfolio (video + graphic work)

-1 short-form video edit (30–60 seconds)

-1 graphic (social post style)



If you don’t submit these, you will not be considered.

title: Licensed Physician
description:
About Us



We are a growing digital health company providing international telemedicine services, including remote medical consultations and issuance of medical documentation such as certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity. Our platform serves clients across Europe and other international markets, operating fully remotely under Philippine jurisdiction.





Role Overview



We are looking for part-time licensed Filipino physicians to join our telemedicine team. You will conduct remote patient consultations, evaluate symptoms, and issue valid medical certificates and documentation as part of our cross-border telemedicine platform. All work is performed entirely online. No in-person clinic visits required.





Key Responsibilities



- Conduct remote telemedicine consultations with international patients via our digital platform

- Evaluate patient-reported symptoms and medical history to determine appropriate medical documentation

- Issue medical certificates (certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity) in accordance with Philippine medical practice standards

- Maintain accurate and confidential patient records for each consultation

- Adhere to all applicable Philippine medical laws, telemedicine regulations, and company protocols

- Respond to consultations within agreed turnaround times (typically same-day)



Required Qualifications



Licensing and Registration (Mandatory)

- Active, valid PRC (Professional Regulation Commission) license as a Doctor of Medicine

- Registered and in good standing with the PRC under Republic Act No. 2382 (The Medical Act of 1959) and its amendments

- Must be able to provide PRC license picture and number, and board certification for verification

- Legally authorized to practice medicine in the Philippines, including issuing medical certificates as part of professional medical practice



Telemedicine Compliance

- Familiarity with or willingness to comply with DOH Administrative Order
(Guidelines on the Use of Telemedicine in Clinical Practice)

- Understanding that services are delivered under Philippine jurisdiction as cross-border telemedicine (WTO GATS Mode 1), and all medical documentation is issued under Philippine medical law



Education

- Doctor of Medicine (MD) degree from a Philippine medical school recognized by CHED (Commission on Higher Education)

- Passed the Philippine Physician Licensure Examination



Experience

- Minimum 1 year of clinical practice (hospital, clinic, or telemedicine setting)

- Prior telemedicine preferred



Work Arrangement



- Part-time, flexible hours. Work on your own schedule within agreed availability windows

- Fully remote. Work from anywhere in the Philippines, provided your PRC license remains active and valid

- Expected workload is 5-10 hours per week, scalable based on demand





Compensation



- Competitive fixed monthly salary based on your availability

- Payment processed monthly via local bank transfer in PHP currency (equivalent to USD $200-$400/month)

- Performance bonuses for consistent quality and turnaround time





How to Apply



Please submit the following:



- Updated CV or Resume highlighting your medical experience

- PRC License Number (will be verified)

- Copy of valid PRC ID or License (digital scan)

- Board certification details (if applicable)

- Brief cover letter explaining your interest in telemedicine and availability



Put PHDOC in your application title so we know you have read this job post. If it is not added, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Operations, Workflow, and Systems Coordinator
description:
We are a boutique, luxury inn located in the heart of Pensacola’s historic district, offering an elevated blend of Southern hospitality, curated experiences, and thoughtful, design-forward comfort. Rooted in family legacy and a passion for refined guest care, we have quickly become a haven for travelers seeking warmth, beauty, and a truly personal touch. From chef-crafted breakfasts to intimate seasonal events and immersive cultural experiences, every detail is intentionally crafted to inspire connection, relaxation, and a sense of home. As we continue to grow, we’re building a team of individuals who care deeply about hospitality, excellence, and creating 
nts that feel unforgettable.



The Operations, Workflow & Systems Coordinator is the architect behind our daily workflow, communication rhythm, guest experience systems, and marketing organization. This is not an administrative assistant role — it is a creator role.



The person in this position will design the internal backbone of a boutique, luxury bed and breakfast where hospitality, culinary excellence, and refined guest experiences come together. They will build processes, create templates, implement systems, and maintain rhythm across all departments so the Owner can remain hands-off while operations run smoothly and cohesively.



This role requires someone who thinks like a systems builder, organizes like a project manager, communicates like a hospitality professional, and operates with a deep sense of ownership.



Core Responsibilities

1. Systems Building & Workflow Creation

You will build the operational infrastructure of Celestine, including:

- Checklists for Guest Experience, Housekeeping, Culinary support, and Events

- SOPs for check-ins, check-outs, room readiness, and breakfast coordination

- Templates for guest communication, team updates, and internal documentation

- Workflows that streamline coordination between leads and departments

- A central digital hub where all documents, schedules, and SOPs live

- Improved systems for consistency, quality, and team alignment

Your role is to create, not just maintain.



2. Operational Coordination & Calendar Management

Build and maintain the master scheduling system for:

- Check-ins and check-outs

- Housekeeping and room turnovers

- Breakfast staffing

- Events and workshops

- Tea
etings

Ensure all tea
mbers always have correct, up-to-date schedules



Anticipate operational needs before they arise



You own the coordination that keeps the entire business synchronized.



3. Communication & Documentation Development

- Create standardized guest communication flows (pre-arrival, stay updates, checkout)

- Maintain the communication library in Celestine’s brand voice

- Draft agendas for weekly meetings and document action items

- Write internal updates for the team

- Produce templates for event communication, vendor coordination, and internal notes

- Create social media and newsletter content

- You help maintain a smooth, polished communication experience across the business and communicate directly with customers.



4. Data Tracking, Reporting & Accountability Support

- Build the operations dashboard (weekly and monthly)

- Track occupancy, revenue, guest feedback trends, and team performance metrics

- Monitor progress toward monthly and quarterly goals

- Identify gaps and propose improvements

- Support light accountability by circulating reminders, deadlines, and summaries

- You create visibility into the health of the business.



5. Marketing Organization & Content Workflow Design

- Build the social media content calendar system

- Organize photos and videos into labeled content libraries

- Set up workflows for content creation, approvals, and posting

- Coordinate with the Owner, Culinary Lead, and Guest Experience Lead to gather content

- Track content performance monthly

- You will organize the marketing engine.



6. Event & Experience Support

- Build event playbooks for brunches, tasting dinners, workshops, and seasonal experiences

- Create event coordination templates

- Track guest registrations, vendor communication, and timelines

- Capture feedback and update systems for future events

- You help standardize the event experience so each one runs flawlessly.

- Develop proposals in response to private event inquiries.

title: Real Estate CAD Specialist (Remote) — Build Accurate Floor Plans from Public Data (Claremont, CA Property)
description:
We are acquiring a residential property in Claremont, CA (91711) and need a highly skilled CAD specialist to create a clean, accurate, architect-ready floor plan and layout — without direct measurements.



You will be responsible for sourcing all available data online (public records, satellite imagery, listing archives, etc.) and converting it into a professional CAD file that can be used for design, planning, and contractor execution.



This is not a beginner task. You must know how to triangulate data, estimate intelligently, and deliver precision-level work.



?



???? OBJECTIVE



Deliver a complete, scaled CAD drawing package of the property, including:

 • Existing floor plan (interior layout)

 • Exterior footprint

 • Room dimensions (estimated but highly accurate)

 • Wall thickness assumptions (standardized)

 • Doors, windows, and structural elements

 • Clean layering and labeling (architect-ready)



?



???? DELIVERABLES



You must deliver:

 • ? .DWG file (AutoCAD or compatible)

 • ? .PDF version (clean, presentation-ready)

 • ? Clearly labeled dimensions

 • ? Layered file (walls, doors, windows, text, etc.)

 • ? Notes section explaining assumptions made



?



???? DATA SOURCES YOU WILL USE



You are expected to independently pull and verify data from sources such as:

 • Zillow / Redfin / Realtor archives

 • Google Maps + Satellite + Street View

 • County assessor records (LA County)

 • MLS photos (archived listings)

 • Property tax records

 • Any other relevant public datasets



?



?? REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY)



You MUST:

 • Have proven CAD experience (AutoCAD or similar)

 • Have experience working with real estate floor plans

 • Be able to reverse-engineer layouts from limited data

 • Understand standard residential construction dimensions

 • Deliver fast (24–72 hours max)

 • Communicate clearly and not require hand-holding



?



???? THIS JOB IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 • You need exact measurements provided

 • You are guessing without validation

 • You are slow or miss deadlines

 • You cannot produce clean, professional CAD files

 • You don’t understand scaling and proportion



?



???? COMPENSATION

 • Fixed price (submit your bid)

 • Bonus for fast, accurate delivery

 • Opportunity for ongoing work (multiple properties)



?



???? TO APPLY (MANDATORY FILTER)



Submit ALL of the following or you will be ignored:

 1. Portfolio of similar work (REAL examples only)

 2. Brief explanation of:

 • How you would approach this with no measurements

 • What sources you would use first

 3. Estimated turnaround time

 4. Confirmation you can deliver DWG + PDF + layered file



?



???? IDEAL CANDIDATE

 • Architectural drafter

 • Real estate CAD specialist

 • Civil/structural freelancer

 • Someone who has done as-built recreations from photos/data



?



???? FINAL NOTE



We move fast. If you’re good, this turns into consistent deal flow.



If you’re average, don’t apply.

title: AI Video Content Creator - Full-time for US Agency
description:
We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency producing high-performance AI generated short-form video ads for HVAC, Plumbing, and Roofing companies across the United States.



We are looking for a highly talented AI Creative Video Producer who can utilize the newest AI video creation tools (VEO3-style platforms, OpenAI Sora, Google Veo, Runway Gen-3, Kling AI, Pika, Luma Dream Machine, Synthesia, HeyGen, PixVerse or similar) to produce realistic, high-engagement service videos.

This role goes beyond basic editing. We need someone who can research, script, source footage, generate AI visuals, and produce polished marketing videos end-to-end.

You should be comfortable using AI tools to create realistic people, environments, and service scenarios related to HVAC, plumbing, and roofing.



Only applicants who provide complete answers to all 8 screening questions will be considered for this full-time role (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST).



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC/Plumbing/Roofing scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



QUESTIONS: 



1.Which AI video tools do you currently use?

(Examples: VEO, Runway, Pika, Kling, HeyGen, Sora-style tools, etc.)





2.Please provide 2–3 examples of videos you personally created using AI tools. Include a short description of your role in creating the video.





3.What is your process for creating a short-form marketing video from start to finish?





4.Have you worked on ads for local service businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, roofing, or construction?

IF YOU HAVE NEVER CREATED AI ADS for HVAC/ROOFER/PLUMBER --- 

I can send you a short script for a 30-second vertical video.IF you'd like to try creating it to showcase your skills.

reply: SEND TEST







5.How do you ensure AI voiceovers pronounce technical words correctly?

Example terms:SEER, AFUE, BTUs, city names.





6.Which editing software do you use most often?





7.How long does it typically take you to produce one finished 30-second ad video?





8.Write a 10-second hook for an HVAC ad offering a free AC inspection.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: VR Developer (Unity & Meta Quest)
description:
VR Developer (Unity & Meta Quest 3) - Full-Time | Remote | AUD $2,000–$2,500



Location: Philippines

Working Hours: Mon–Fri, Western Australian business hours (UTC+8)

Reporting to: Head of XR Development

Works with: Head of Development, Head of 3D Design, 3D Artists, Technical Artists, Project Managers, Animation & Real-Time Leads



Role Overview



3D Walkabout is looking for a Unity VR developer with strong experience building applications for Meta Quest headsets. This role is focused on developing, maintaining, and shipping VR experiences on Quest 2 and Quest 3, primarily using Unity, Meta SDK and OpenXR.



This is a hands-on role suited to someone who is comfortable working close to the hardware, cares about performance, and understands the constraints of standalone VR. You will be working on real client and internal projects, not prototypes that never ship.



What You’ll Be Doing



- Develop VR applications in Unity for Meta Quest 2 and Quest 3

- Implement VR interactions using hand tracking and controllers

- Work with MR features such as passthrough where required

- Optimise scenes for performance, memory, and battery life on standalone headsets

- Integrate UI, interactions, audio, and gameplay systems into production-ready builds

- Collaborate with artists to ensure assets are Quest-ready and performant



Tools & Technologies



Essential



- Unity (C#) with shipped VR projects

- Meta Quest SDK / OpenXR

- XR Interaction Toolkit or custom interaction systems

- Performance optimisation for standalone VR

- Git and collaborative workflows



Preferred



- Hand tracking and mixed reality on Quest

- Shader Graph or lightweight custom shaders

- Unity URP for VR

- Experience profiling with Unity Profiler and Meta tools

- Building APKs and managing Quest deployment pipelines

- Networking / Multiplayer – Photon, Netcode for GameObjects



About You



- 3+ years professional experience with Unity

- Direct experience shipping VR content, ideally on Meta Quest

- Comfortable debugging performance and interaction issues

- Able to work independently and communicate clearly in a remote team

- Detail-oriented and focused on delivering stable, usable builds



Bonus Experience



- Training, simulation, or enterprise VR

- Tooling or editor scripts in Unity

- Networking or data-driven VR applications

- Experience porting projects between platforms



What You’ll Get



- Focused VR work on real projects that ship

- Exposure to Quest-first and MR applications

- Direct collaboration with senior XR and 3D developers

- Opportunity to grow with an established XR studio



About Us



3D Walkabout is an Australian 3D visualisation and XR studio creating immersive content for clients across property, infrastructure, education, and industry. We blend creativity, technology, and storytelling to bring digital environments and products to life through 3D, VR, AR, and interactive experiences.



How to Apply



Send us:



- Your CV or LinkedIn profile

- A portfolio or GitHub showing Unity VR work

- A short note about your experience with Meta Quest or standalone VR

title: Outreach & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are in search of a performance-oriented Outreach & Lead Generation Specialist to help expand our outbound initiatives. This is a fully remote position with a strong emphasis on LinkedIn and
 engagement, along with contributions to content creation and basic marketing support tasks.



We’re looking for someone experienced in developing outbound pipelines and connecting with prospects through thoughtful, structured, and customized outreach strategies.



Role Responsibilities:



LinkedIn Prospecting & Outreach (Primary Responsibility):

-Initiate up to 400 targeted connection requests each month

-Identify and reach out to key stakeholders such as HR Directors, Managing Directors, and Sales Directors

-Manage personalized, multi-step follow-up sequences

-Utilize voice notes in follow-ups to improve response rates

-Analyze campaign metrics and refine messaging for better outcomes



 Campaigns & Lead Generation:

-Plan and execute cold and warm
 outreach campaigns

-Gather and compile prospect contact information through sourcing and data scraping

-Implement structured three-step
 sequences

-Sync LinkedIn-generated leads with
 outreach efforts

-Monitor campaign performance and enhance engagement and conversion rates



Content Creation Support (Secondary Focus):

-Prepare and schedule up to five LinkedIn posts weekly

-Develop written content based on provided videos and key messaging themes

-Content topics may include:

      Founder story

      Emotional intelligence (EQ-i 2.0)

      Cost of a bad hire

      Industry insights

-Maintain regular posting across both personal and company LinkedIn accounts



Campaign & Lead Magnet Assistance:

-Support the rollout of lead magnets, including AI-based assessments

-Contribute to campaign refinements based on engagement data and results



Marketing & Operational Support:

-Assist with basic SEO enhancements

-Help maintain CRM data and ensure proper website integration

-Use outreach and tracking tools to support campaign performance and organization



Required Qualifications:

-Minimum of 2 years’ experience in B2B outreach, lead generation, or an SDR role

-Strong English communication skills, with the ability to clearly express technical concepts

-At least 2 years of hands-on experience running LinkedIn outreach campaigns, including connection requests, follow-ups, and engagement using tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator (built on LinkedIn)

-At least 2 years of experience managing cold
 outreach and sequencing using platforms such as Instantly or Lemlist (built on SMTP/email infrastructure)

-At least 2 years of experience in lead sourcing and data scraping using tools like Apollo (built on cloud-based SaaS data systems)

-Demonstrated ability to build and improve outbound pipelines, including campaign tracking, A/B testing, and conversion optimization (typically using CRM and analytics dashboards)

-At least 1 year of experience handling CRM systems and maintaining lead tracking workflows, ensuring proper integration across outreach tools and databases



Nice-To-Have but not required: 

-At least 1 year of experience supporting outreach within recruitment or B2B services environments

-At least 1 year of experience creating and scheduling LinkedIn content, including personal branding and company page management (via LinkedIn tools or schedulers)

-Basic understanding of SEO practices, including keyword usage and on-page optimization (typically applied through CMS platforms)

-Familiarity with AI-based lead magnets and campaign funnels, including assessment tools and gated content delivery

-Experience working with UK-based markets, including managing time zone alignment and communication expectations

-Exposure to marketing automation and campaign tracking systems connected to outreach workflows

-Experience using voice notes or multimedia approaches to improve prospect engagement

title: Senior TikTok Shop Affiliate Outreach Manager (US Market)
description:

We are a premium K-Beauty brand specializing in professional aesthetic and anti-aging skincare (Wrinkle Tox 5D Shot). We are looking for a high-performing TikTok Shop Affiliate Outreach Manager to scale our US presence. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of identifying top-tier skincare influencers and driving significant revenue through strategic partnerships.



**[Key Responsibilities]**

- **Precise Targeting:** Focus on influencers within the skincare/beauty niche who have generated over $5,000 in revenue in the last 30 days.

- **End-to-End Communication:** Manage all communications via TikTok DM,
, and SNS. Craft personalized, high-converting invitation messages.

- **Data-Driven:** Proficient in TikTok analytics tools (e.g., KaloData, FastMoss, EchoTik).

title: Tax Preparer - Sacramento Tax Resolution
description:
About Sacramento Tax Resolution

We're a rapidly growing tax resolution and planning firm serving business owners and high-income individuals across the United States. Over the past seven years, we've built a reputation for exceptional client service, strategic tax planning, and delivering measurable results. We operate with a lean, highly efficient team where every member plays a critical role in our clients' financial success.



The Opportunity

We're seeking an experienced Tax Preparer to join our remote team and take ownership of our tax preparation operations. This isn't a typical data-entry tax prep role - you'll be working with business owners, contractors, and high-net-worth individuals on complex returns including multi-state filings, cost segregation studies, and strategic tax planning implementations.



This role is perfect for someone who:

• Wants to grow beyond basic 1040-EZ returns into sophisticated tax work

• Takes pride in accuracy and thoroughness

• Thrives with clear systems and documentation

• Wants long-term stability with a growing firm

• Values continuous learning and professional development



Core Responsibilities

Tax Preparation & Review:

• Prepare individual and business tax returns (1040, 1120, 1120S, 1065, 990)

• Handle multi-state tax returns and complex scenarios

• Review client-provided documentation for completeness and accuracy

• Implement tax planning strategies developed by our planning team

• Prepare amended returns and prior-year filings

• Calculate estimated tax payments and quarterly projections



Client Communication:

• Respond to client questions via
 and client portal

• Request missing documentation and follow up systematically

• Explain tax positions and filing strategies in clear, understandable terms

• Maintain professional communication standards that reflect our firm's values



Quality & Compliance:

• Ensure all returns meet IRS compliance standards

• Document research and support for tax positions

• Maintain organized digital files for each client

• Follow firm SOPs and quality control checklists

• Stay current on tax law changes affecting our client base



Systems & Process:

• Follow and improve upon established preparation workflows

• Use Drake Tax Software, Practice Management Software, and internal systems

• Document recurring issues and suggest process improvements

• Maintain detailed notes and work papers for review



Required Qualifications

Must-Haves:

• Minimum 3 years of tax preparation experience

• Strong working knowledge of US individual and business taxation

• Experience with Drake Tax Software (or ability to learn quickly)

• Proficient in Excel and comfortable with cloud-based systems

• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills

• High-speed internet connection and professional home office setup

• Availability during US business hours (Pacific Time preferred)



Highly Preferred:

• Experience with multi-state returns

• Knowledge of contractor/construction industry taxation

• Familiarity with cost segregation or fixed asset accounting

• Previous experience with tax resolution or IRS representation

• PTIN or equivalent credential (or willingness to obtain)



What We Provide

• Comprehensive Training: Detailed SOPs, video training, and ongoing support

• Professional Development: Access to CPE courses and continuing education

• Clear Systems: We document everything so you're never guessing

• Growth Opportunity: As we scale, leadership roles will open up

• Stable, Long-Term Position: We're building a team for the long haul

• Competitive Compensation: Based on experience and skill level

• Modern Tools: All software and systems provided



Our Ideal Candidate

You're detail-oriented without being slow. You ask questions when unclear rather than guessing. You take ownership of your work and don't need micromanagement. You're comfortable with technology and learn new systems quickly. You understand that tax preparation is both technical work and client service, and you excel at both.



Compensation & Schedule

• Competitive salary based on experience (please include your rate expectation)

• Full-time position: 40 hours per week

• Schedule flexibility around Pacific Time business hours

• Seasonal flexibility during tax season (January-April may require additional hours)

• Performance-based increases as you demonstrate mastery



How to Apply

Please submit:

1. Your resume highlighting relevant tax preparation experience

2. A brief cover letter explaining why you're the right fit for this role

3. Your current/expected hourly or monthly rate

4. Examples of tax return types you've prepared (without client names/sensitive data)

5. Your available start date

In your cover letter, please answer: "What's the most complex tax situation you've handled, and how did you approach it?"

We review applications on a rolling basis and will conduct video interviews with qualified candidates.

title: Sales Support & Data Entry Virtual Assistant (Night Shift / PST)
description:
About GraphicLab: GraphicLab is a fast-paced promotional products company based in California. We handle big clients, big projects, and in-house screen printing and embroidery. You will act as the direct support line for our Sales Team, ensuring that our internal systems run flawlessly so our sales team can focus on client relationships.



The Role: We are seeking a highly reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage the critical backend data of our sales process. You will be responsible for taking quotes and
ed instructions from our California team and ensuring it is accurately entered into our CRM.



Key Responsibilities:



Data Entry & CRM Management: Accurately enter new jobs and orders into our CRM system (CommonSKU) for different sales representatives.



Quoting Support: Assist in building and organizing quotes for new jobs based on provided pricing parameters.



Order Tracking: Monitor the status of jobs by checking in with production schedules and external vendors.



Logistics: Compile and organize shipping/tracking information to be sent to clients.



Communication: Maintain clear, daily communication with the California-based Sales Team to provide end-of-shift progress reports.



Requirements:



Flawless English (Written more than Spoken): You must be able to write clear, professional
s and CRM communications. You will also attend virtual meetings once a week with our internal team and occasionally with our customers.



Attention to Detail: You must be highly diligent; a single typo in a SKU number or choosing the wrong color can cost the company money.



Shift Requirement: You must be available to work the US Pacific Standard Time (PST) shift to overlap with our California office (8:30 AM - 4:30 PM PST).



Tech-Savvy: Familiarity with CRM systems is a plus, but a strong general ability to learn new software quickly is required (MS Office, Google Workspace, Adobe, etc.).



How to Apply:



Submit your resume.



Include a brief cover letter explaining your experience with data entry or CRM management.



A 1 or 2 Minute Camera Loom Video: In this video, please introduce yourself, briefly mention your CRM experience, your background working as a VA on the night shift, and answer this scenario:

If a vendor
s you to say a shipment of 500 shirts is delayed by 3 days, what are the exact steps you take to update our system and notify our California sales team?

title: Credit Repair Dispute Processor — FCRA / FDCPA / Arbitration Support (Part-Time)
description:
********IMPORTANT WORKFLOW NOTE*******



 Our Company is a consumer advocacy and financial services organization focused on credit reporting accuracy, dispute resolution, and regulatory compliance. We operate using structured internal workflows, proprietary templates, and case-law-driven procedures.



We do not use traditional credit repair software. Our system is built on documented processes, legal compliance standards, and disciplined execution.



We are currently hiring four (4) part-time dispute processors to support operations while our internal CDC (Consumer Defense Command) platform is being developed.



Position Overview

This role is for individuals who are comfortable working in a compliance-driven environment and can follow structured procedures. You will be responsible for preparing disputes, reviewing documentation, tracking case activity, and supporting escalation processes including arbitration readiness when applicable.



This is not a sales role.

This is an operations and documentation role.



Core Responsibilities



Review client credit reports and supporting documentation

Prepare dispute letters using company templates and procedures

Maintain organized case records and follow-up schedules

Track dispute timelines and regulatory deadlines

Communicate with clients using structured messaging guidelines

Assist with escalation preparation, including documentation for arbitration matters

Follow internal workflow systems and compliance standards

Maintain accuracy and confidentiality in all case handling



Required Knowledge & Skills



Working knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA)

Working knowledge of the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)

Ability to read and follow written procedures carefully

Strong attention to detail and documentation accuracy

Professional written communication skills

Ability to manage multiple cases simultaneously

Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

Ability to follow structured workflows without constant supervision



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in a legal, compliance, collections, or paralegal environment

Familiarity with dispute processing or credit reporting systems

Exposure to regulatory compliance or consumer protection work

Familiarity with arbitration processes or willingness to be trained

Experience working with case documentation or legal records



Training & Workflow



All staff are trained on:



Company dispute procedures

Documentation standards

Timeline management

Compliance expectations

Escalation and arbitration preparation workflows



No prior arbitration experience is required, but candidates must be willing to learn.



Work Structure



Part-Time Position

Remote Work

Structured workflow environment

Performance-based expectations

Clear task assignments and measurable output



Compensation Structure



Hourly base pay (part-time)

Performance incentives based on productivity and case handling accuracy

Opportunity for increased responsibility and long-term role stability



Important Workflow Note



We do not use automated credit repair software.

All work is completed using documented procedures, structured templates, and internal workflow systems.



Candidates must be comfortable following established processes and maintaining professional documentation standards.



Application Instructions



To be considered, include the following in your application:



A brief description of your experience with documentation, compliance, or case processing

Confirmation that you are comfortable following structured procedures

Your available weekly work hours

Your expected hourly rate



Applications that do not follow instructions may not be reviewed.





To confirm that you carefully read this job posting and can follow structured procedures, your application must include the following:



1) Begin your message with the word:

CDC



2) Answer the two screening questions below



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.



Screening Question 1 — FCRA Knowledge



A consumer disputes a collection account on their credit report, but the credit bureau responds that the account has been "verified as accurate" without providing documentation or explaining the method used to verify the information.



What would be your next step, and why?

Please reference the applicable law or principle if you know it.



Screening Question 2 — Workflow Judgment



You are managing multiple client disputes, and one account is approaching the 30-day investigation deadline under the Fair Credit Reporting Act.



What steps would you take to ensure compliance and protect the client’s rights?

title: Quote Preparation Specialist (Custom Neon Signs)
description:
Job Title: Quote Preparation Specialist (Custom Neon Signs)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-time // Working night shifts possible



ABOUT US

We are an international e-commerce company specialized in premium custom neon signs.

Every day, we receive 100–200 custom design requests from customers worldwide.



Our goal:

Turn customer ideas into high-impact neon signs that convert into sales



YOUR ROLE

As a Quote Preparation Specialist, you translate customer requests into clear, optimized instructions for our design team and quotation system.



Customers already provide:

• Logo files

• Text

• Preferred size

• Colors

• References



Your job is to interpret this input and determine the best possible execution of the neon sign.



This role is not about designing in tools, but about:

• Understanding what the customer wants

• Visualizing the best end result

• Translating this into a clear and optimized setup



WHAT YOU WILL DO

• Interpretation & Visualization (Core of the role)

• Analyze incoming customer requests

• Understand the intention behind the design

• Mentally visualize how the neon sign should look in real life

• Translate this into:

-- Correct sizing

-- Layout decisions

-- Design structure



Technical & Production Thinking

• Ensure every request aligns with neon production limitations

• Determine:

-- What is possible

-- What needs to be simplified or adjusted

• Create instructions that are:

-- Clear

-- Efficient

-- Production-ready



Quote Preparation

• Prepare the request for quotation

• Define size, structure, and execution level

• Ensure the setup is:

-- Visually strong

-- Technically correct

-- Commercially optimized



Critical Decision Making (High Impact)

You must assess:

• What type of customer is this?

• What is the use case (home, event, business, branding)?

• What is the commercial potential?



Based on this, you d
:

Simple and efficient for private / price-sensitive customers

Larger and more detailed for business / high-value clients



Your decisions directly impact whether the customer buys or not.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Must-have:

• Proper English speaking and writing

• Strong visual thinking ability

• Good understanding of proportions, sizing, and layout

• Commercial awareness

• High attention to detail

• Ability to process high volumes quickly and accurately



Bonus:

• Experience in design, architecture, or technical drawing

• Experience with quoting or production processes

• Basic understanding of design tools



PERSONALITY FIT

You are:

• Analytical + creative

• Structured and precise

• Independent in decision making

• Aware that your work directly impacts revenue



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• High conversion rate on quotes

• Minimal corrections from design/production team

• Fast and consistent output

• Strong alignment between request and final product



COMPENSATION

• Competitive salary (Philippines market)

• Performance-based bonuses

• Growth opportunities in a fast-scaling company



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:



Short introduction

Why you are a strong fit

(Optional) Examples of visual or analytical work

title: HOUSE OF ELI – VIRTUAL ASSISTANT (SOCIAL + E-COMMERCE)
description:

Hi, I’m Stacey — a mum, carer, and founder building a heartfelt lifestyle brand called House of Eli.



This brand is deeply personal. It’s inspired by my son Eli and grounded in family, comfort, connection, and real life. At the centre of everything is a red heart — representing Eli — and a vision to create meaningful, high-quality lifestyle products (loungewear, everyday essentials, and more).



I’m looking for someone special to grow with us, not just to complete tasks, but to help bring this brand to life.



THE ROLE



I’m looking for a Virtual Assistant with strengths in social media and e-commerce who can support both the creative and operational side of building a brand from the ground up.



This is not just admin — I need someone who can think, contribute ideas, take initiative, and evolve with the business as we grow.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



You’ll work closely with me across:



Content + Social Media



Creating Instagram content (posts, reels, captions)

Developing content ideas aligned with our brand story

Writing captions, hashtags, and storytelling-driven posts

Engaging with our audience (comments, DMs, community building)



Design + Brand Support



Creating simple, clean graphics in Canva

Supporting visual consistency across the brand



E-commerce + Product

Uploading and managing products (Shopify or similar)

Assisting with product descriptions and listings

Researching product ideas, trends, and suppliers



Growth + Launch Support

Assisting with product drop planning and execution

Supporting influencer outreach and brand collaborations

Helping build awareness and grow the brand organically



WHO I’M LOOKING FOR

Someone who is:

Creative + proactive (brings ideas, not just follows instructions)

Experienced in Instagram content + growth

Confident using Canva

Familiar with e-commerce platforms (Shopify is a bonus)

A strong communicator (clear, warm, professional English)

Reliable, organised, and positive

Aligned with family values, purpose-driven brands, and storytelling



HOURS & PAY

Starting part-time (20 hours per week)

Flexible structure as we build

Opportunity to grow into a long-term role

Pay based on experience



WHY JOIN HOUSE OF ELI?



This is more than a role; it’s the beginning of something meaningful.



We’re building a brand with heart, purpose, and long-term vision. I’m looking for someone who genuinely wants to be part of that journey and help shape it from the early stages.



TO APPLY

-A short introduction about yourself

-Examples of Instagram accounts or content you’ve managed

-Your hourly rate

-The word “ELI” in your application



I’m really looking forward to finding the right person to grow with 



Stacey

title: Amazon Account Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced and proactive Amazon Account Manager to oversee the day-to-day operations of our Amazon storefront. The ideal candidate is a problem-solver who understands the behind-the-scenes of Seller Central, from inventory logistics to customer satisfaction and listing health. You will be responsible for ensuring our account remains healthy, our listings stay active, and our stock levels are optimized.



Key Responsibilities

1. Account Health & Case Management

-Monitor daily account health metrics to ensure compliance with Amazon policies.

-Manage and resolve Amazon Cases (SS cases) regarding listing suppressions, brand registry issues, or shipment discrepancies.

-Proactively address any warnings or policy violations.



2. Inventory & Logistics

-Sales Velocity Tracking: Monitor daily/weekly sales trends to forecast future demand.

-Replenishment: Manage FBA shipments and coordinate with our 3PL warehouse to ensure timely stock transfers.

-Stock Monitoring: Maintain a 'Days in Stock' report to prevent stock-outs or excessive long-term storage fees, and track inventory at all 3PLs.



3. Listing Management

-Handle all inventory uploads and flat-file submissions.

-Troubleshoot listing errors (Detail Page Removed, stranded inventory, or hijacked listings).

-Track listing attributes, such as imagery for any potential issues or changes



4. Customer Experience

-Manage all Customer Service inquiries with a high level of professionalism

-Monitor and respond to Feedback and Reviews to maintain a high seller rating.

-Process returns and manage refund claims where necessary.



5. Reporting & Growth

-Provide weekly reports on sales performance, refund rates, and inventory age.

-Identify opportunities for account growth, such as enrolling in new programs (Vine, Small and Light, etc.).

-Monthly Stock Takes



Qualifications

-Experience: 2+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central (FBA preferred).

-Tech Savvy: Proficient with Amazon flat files, Helium10 or Jungle Scout, and Excel/Google Sheets/Sellerboard

-Communication: Excellent written English for customer service and case appeals.

-Detail-Oriented: You should be someone who notices a 1% dip in conversion or a stranded unit immediately.



To apply, submit your resume and a short summary of your experience with 3PL-to-FBA workflows and Amazon account management to 
 titled - 'Amazon Account Manager - Location'.

title: Video Editor (language education content)
description:
I am an Accent & Pronunciation Coach looking for a detail-oriented Video Editor to produce educational content, both short- and long-form. You will primarily be turning "talking head" footage into high-retention social media content, such as short form instagram content or long form video podcasts for YouTube.



Most of my content consists of "talking head" videos where I discuss linguistics, pronunciation, and the mindset behind language learning.



Core Responsibilities:



- Video editing: cutting out bloopers, minimal zooms to emphasize key points, and other typical social media cuts for audience retention.

- Audio: occasional sound effects to emphasize key points, audio cleanup if necessary

- Educational Overlays: Correcting auto-captions, placing diagrams or phonetic transcriptions and other text (I will provide this).



Requirements:



- English proficiency: I teach English pronunciation, so you need to be decent in English, especially since a lot of content revolves around foreign-accented English, your English needs to be good enough to understand other accents

- Communication with me: as it is likely I may need to correct overlaid text or diagrams, so we will need to be in contact a few times a week.

- File management: There will likely be a lot of files we are sharing, so make sure you name the files correctly and place them in the right folders.



How to apply:

Please link your portfolio of video editing work. Also start your message with “phonetics” so I know you’ve read this. If you have any experience with language teaching or the English language, please let me know about that too.





PLEASE NOTE:

I am a small one person company. I cannot afford to pay too much! I'm only looking for a PART-TIME video editor, a couple of videos a week max.

title: Junior Publishing Operations Manager

What You Will Do

- Administrative support across our Notion-based project management system

- ARC and review outreach via
 and
 Messenger

- Basic reporting on sales, reviews, and ad performance



As you develop:

- Niche and keyword research using Helium 10

-
 Ads and Amazon Ads management

- AI-assisted writing and editing support

What We Are Looking For

- Comfortable working independently from written SOPs and documentation

- Curious about books, publishing, and the business behind writing

- Willing to learn unfamiliar tools systematically

- Reliable, honest, and direct in communication



Publishing experience is a plus but not required. 

Intelligence and work ethic matter more than a specific CV.



Practical Details

- Full-time, 8 hours per day

- Remote, working with an operator across European time zones

- Salary: open to discussion based on experience and demonstrated capability

- Start date: flexible, Q2 or Q3 2026



How to Apply



Send a short message — no more than three paragraphs — explaining why this role interests you and what in your background is most relevant. Include one specific example of a time you followed a complex written process or learned a new system independently.



Applications that do not answer the question will not be considered.

title: Experienced Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are a transaction coordination company looking for an experienced transaction coordinator to manage real estate transactions from contract to close.



***PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION, MAKE SURE YOU ARE QUALIFIED, AND FOLLOW THE SUBMISSION GUIDELINES***



Non-negotiable requirements (these are all a MUST):

- 1+ years of experience with California real estate transactions and contracts, managing entire transactions from start to finish, including drafting offers, counter offers, disclosures and other documents.

- Experience managing at least 20 pending transactions at one time independently and accurately.

- Available to work Monday - Friday, 8:30 - 5:30 PST.

- Experience using A-Frame transaction management software.

- Experience with brokerage software platforms such as KW Command, Skyslope, Glide and others is a plus.

- Experience with Google Workspace, Google Forms, Zapier, and basic AI software.

- Excellent written and spoken English.

- Strong customer service skills. You must be comfortable not only via
 and text, but also on the phone.

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup, including backup power and internet, and two monitors.

- Ability to work independently while collaborating with a team.

- Self starter, proactive, and great communicator.



This role is critical to ensuring smooth, compliant, and stress-free transactions for our real estate agents and clients. 



If you are detail-oriented, proactive, and enjoy managing processes and communication, this is a long-term opportunity with a growing real estate operations company.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage at least 20 pending real estate transactions from executed contract through closing independently.

- Review contracts and disclosures for accuracy and completeness

- Ensure compliance with real estate requirements and timelines

- Coordinate communication between agents, clients, lenders, escrow officers, and vendors

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and required documentation

- Upload and manage files within transaction management platforms

- Maintain accurate transaction records and status updates

- Provide excellent client and agent support throughout the transaction process

- Identify opportunities to improve workflows and efficiency



Who This Is a Good Fit For:

- You are comfortable independently handling at least 20 pending transactions at one time.

- You are an excellent communicator.

- You provide outstanding customer service.

- You are proactive, organized and highly detail oriented.



Who This Is NOT For:

- Someone who only wants to be behind the scenes and not communicate with clients or parties to a transaction.

- Someone who only wants to be a 'paper pusher'.

- Someone who avoids communication tasks.



Compensation

- Competitive pay based on experience

- Opportunity for long-term growth



***HOW TO APPLY***



Please submit:

- A short introduction video, telling us how you specifically fit the qualifications listed above. D

- A brief summary of your experience specifically related to the qualifications above.

title: Full Stack Developer – Senior – React / .NET / Azure
description:

We’re building a large-scale customer engagement platform that unifies live chat, messaging, and AI-driven automation. The platform handles high-volume, real-time interactions and integrates with Azure services to power intelligent workflows, chatbots, and analytics. You’ll join our engineering team expanding AI capabilities and refining product architecture.



Role Overview

We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer with strong front-end expertise in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, plus back-end experience in C#, .NET Core, and Azure Cloud. This role focuses on building and integrating AI-driven capabilities, authentication and deployment flows, and enterprise-grade service architecture.

title: Marketing & Business Development Specialist (SaaS)
description:

We’re a SaaS company focused on customer engagement solutions. We’re expanding our marketing and business development efforts and need a skilled professional who can manage campaigns, capture leads, and support growth initiatives across both private sector and government opportunities.

Marketing & Lead Generation

Qualifications

• Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to wear multiple hats in a small business environment.

How to Apply

s, etc)

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Company Overview

Join our SaaS Customer Engagement Platform company as a Remote DevOps Engineer. We are looking for a highly motivated, self-starting candidate who is ready to take ownership of our infrastructure and security compliance initiatives.



Role Description

As a DevOps Engineer, you'll own the full lifecycle of our cloud infrastructure and deployment systems. You'll build CI/CD pipelines, manage Azure resources, drive security certification initiatives, and work with our team to optimize costs. We're looking for someone with genuine drive and curiosity who digs into problems, learns quickly, and keeps pushing forward. You don't need to know everything on day one, but you need the hunger to master it.



Key Responsibilities



Infrastructure & Deployment

- Architect, develop, deploy, and evolve CI/CD systems for our cloud applications

- Write application deployment automation using industry-standard tools like Jenkins

- Deploy and manage Azure services including App Services, SQL Database, and Virtual Machines

- Monitor system performance and respond to monitoring alerts

- Provide systems support and perform emergency deployments outside standard hours when needed



Security Certifications & Compliance

- Lead the initiative to achieve and maintain key security certifications including ISO 27001 and FedRAMP

- Develop a strategic roadmap for pursuing multiple certifications, identifying overlaps and dependencies

- Execute certification initiatives incrementally, building knowledge and compliance over time

- Write comprehensive documentation for security certification applications and audits

- Implement and maintain security best practices across infrastructure



Data & Database Management

- Demonstrate strong understanding of database systems including MongoDB and SQL databases

- Implement and manage backup strategies and disaster recovery procedures

- Apply security best practices in data storage, access, and management



Cost Optimization

- Identify and recommend Azure cost-saving opportunities and optimization techniques

- Collaborate with development teams to determine cost-efficient architectural solutions

- Provide guidance on resource utilization and cloud spending optimization



User & System Administration

- Manage Active Directory administration including adding users, setting up new employees and contractors

- Provide configuration support and troubleshooting for employees and contractors as needed



What We're Looking For

- Genuine drive to learn and take on complex challenges

- Self-directed problem solver who stays engaged with difficult problems

- Strong communication and documentation skills

- Ability to work independently

- Willingness to respond to emergencies outside standard hours



Foundational Experience (You'll grow from here)

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD concepts and tools like Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions

- Working knowledge of Azure cloud platform

- Understanding of GitHub for version control and collaboration

- Experience with monitoring and observability tools (Pingdom, DataDog, New Relic, or similar)

- Basic familiarity with databases and scripting/automation concepts

- Willingness to perform deployment tasks during off-hours in emergency situations



 Required for Application

- Provide a link to your resume/CV

- Include a cover letter with a brief summary of your relevant experience and why you are interested in this position

- Use the subject line: 'DevOps - [Your Name]'

title: Accounts Assistant
description:
Accounts Assistant

We’re on the lookout for an Accounts Assistant to join our expanding team.  



A Bit About HeadBox

At HeadBox, our purpose is simple. We connect people and spaces to make brilliant things happen.

But it's not always been straightforward to hire or host at an amazing venue. In fact, prior to the company's inception in 2015, it was the exact opposite. Our business was born from frustration at the outdated, slow, inefficient and time-consuming venue booking process that anyone looking to book a space had to endure.

Since then, we've uncovered more challenges faced by corporates, venue managers and people looking for venue space but our purpose has always remained the same. We've spent the last few years becoming obsessed with our customers and their problems so that we can build products, tools and features to make their lives easier. Think of it as human-kind event-tech. Our ecosystem of products make event and venue management simple, secure and transparent, whether you want to hire a space or host an event.

HeadBox Australia launched in 2020 led by Ali Lord, ex-Head of Events at Dentsu Aegis UK. In her previous role, Ali was one of the early adopters of the HeadBox Business technology and experienced first hand the benefits and efficiencies it provides corporations. Ali quickly knew this was a product she had to bring back to Australia.

HeadBox are now in the process of taking Australia by storm and are looking for a new tea
mber to join us on this exciting journey.



About You

You can hit the ground running, ideally holding a Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy or related professional qualification with at least 2 years of experience in a similar role with demonstrated skills and abilities.. 

You have hands-on experience and good understanding of using Xero accounting software. 

It would be advantageous for you to hold knowledge of the Australian taxation and accounting system. 

You’re highly organised, detail-oriented, and can work well under pressure. You have a strong work ethic, a curiosity for learning, and a desire to contribute to our collective success.



The Role

The Accounts Assistant is primarily responsible for Accounts Receivables, Accounts Payable and Bookkeeping functions across the business. Reporting to the Finance Officer, this role has a wealth of variety on offer as you’ll be exposed to all areas of the business as new customers join and the teams win new business. 



Key Responsibilities



- Accounts Receivable & Payable

- Prepare and issue invoices to HeadBox clients in consultation with the business development, customer success and event planning and event management tea
mbers. 

- Manage overdue invoices and follow up on outstanding payments.

- Reconcile bank transactions and accounts.

- Process and code supplier invoices accurately.

- Assist with month-end and year-end reconciliations.

- Support the preparation of accurate financial reports and schedules.

- Ensure compliance with accounting and financial reporting standards.



Miscellaneous Support

- Assist the finance and operations team with ad hoc tasks from time to time

- Support the commercial teams with finance-related queries and data.



Requirements 

- Commercial aspiration: a drive and willingness to learn the key commercial skills required to be a competent commercial tea
mber.

- Communication: it is important that you have strong interpersonal and communication skills as you will be interacting with clients and you will be required to tailor your communication appropriately to the right person. 

- Attention to detail: goes without saying really, but nothing goes unnoticed by you. You're risk-averse and your accounting is meticulous, accurate and consistent. You like to get it done the right way the first time around. Big picture thinking is essential.

- Be great to work with: we’re looking for someone who embodies the HeadBox values of brilliance, integrity, empathy, curiosity. We need someone independent, flexible, adaptable and ready to get stuck-in. 

- Growth mindset: you love staying abreast of the latest tools, techniques and equipment in your area of focus and you're happy to share your intel with the team.

- Loyalty: we're big on people who get what we do, why we're doing it and those who genuinely want to be part of something that is shaking up markets that are steeped in old-fashioned ways. You're in it for the long haul, just like the rest of the crew.



Toolbox

Experience in the following is highly desirable as you will be using these tools to do your job:

- MS Office (Word, Excel, PPT) AND Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides) - Advance experience

- Xero (Accounting Software) 



In the course of the role, you will also be exposed the other tech tools we use, which include:

- HubDoc (Document Collection & Management Software)

- Stripe (Online Payment Processing Software)

- Hubspot (Customer Relationship Management Software)

- HeadBox (Our own proprietary Software)
