title: Expert Construction Virtual Assistant for Australian Builder
description:
About Us



Evolve Homes Queensland is a fast growing residential building company based in South East Queensland, Australia.



We specialise in fixed price full turn key homes with premium inclusions and a 16 week express building program. We are focused on quality, speed, strong systems, and excellent client service.



The Role



We are looking for an Expert Virtual Assistant with real construction administration experience, preferably supporting an Australian builder or construction business.



This is a full time, long term role. We need someone organised, proactive, detail focused, and confident working in a fast paced construction environment.



This is not an entry level admin role.



You must already understand how to support a busy team, manage documents, follow up stakeholders, and keep projects moving.



Important:



We are not accepting applicants who currently have multiple clients or other jobs.



This is an exclusive full time role. You must be fully available during work hours and able to commit your full focus to our business.



If you currently work for other clients, run side jobs, or have overlapping commitments, please do not apply.



Responsibilities

• Provide day to day admin support to the construction team

• Manage calendars, follow ups, meeting coordination, and general team support

• Prepare, send, file, and track construction documents

• Maintain accurate project records, reports, and timelines

• Coordinate with suppliers, trades, contractors, and internal staff

• Help track project progress and flag missing items or delays

• Support reporting, document control, and project systems

• Assist with presentations, spreadsheets, and general operations admin

• Help ensure nothing slips through the cracks across active jobs



Requirements

• Proven experience in construction admin, project coordination, or similar support role

• Strong preference for experience with Australian builders, trades, or construction companies

• Excellent written and verbal English

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow process exactly

• Highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

• Strong Microsoft Office skills, especially Word and Excel

• Confident using CRMs, project management tools, and cloud based systems

• Good understanding of construction terminology and workflows

• Professional, reliable, responsive, and proactive

• Stable internet, reliable computer, and quiet work from home setup

• Willing to work full time on an exclusive basis only



What We Offer

• Competitive salary based on experience

• Permanent work from home arrangement

• Australian holidays off

• 5 paid vacation leaves

• Weekends off

• Day shift schedule from 8:00 am to 5:00 pm Philippine Time

• Ongoing training and support

• Long term opportunity with a growing Australian builder



How to Apply



• To be considered, you must follow all steps exactly.



Step 1



Watch this video:





Step 2



Record a video using Loom and address it to L.A.



Please face the camera and answer naturally. We want real and unscripted responses.



In your video, answer these questions:



•  What did you like best about the video you watched?

•  Tell us about your relevant work experience, especially with Australian clients or builders

•  What keeps you motivated?

•  How would you outperform other applicants if given this role?

•  Lastly, what is your favorite childhood memory (only one) and why?



Step 3



Send your application to 
 with these attachments:



- Loom video link

- Updated CV

- Screenshot of your computer make and model

- Screenshot of your internet speed

- Screenshot of your DISC personality test result from 
/disc-personality-test/



Step 4



Your
 subject line must include:

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

TThe Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Business Process Admin (experienced in Sharepoint)
description:

The Business Process Admin or Visual Communication Admin plays a key role in supporting internal operations by managing and updating content in company information hubs, creating visually compelling slide decks, and contributing to content development per Cardone Ventures’ brand guidelines. This role combines administrative coordination with creative execution, ensuring that internal documents, presentations, and shared resources are well-organized, up-to-date, and aligned with brand standards.



The Business Process Admin / Visual Communication Admin position is highly independent but will provide support to all departments within our organization. You will need to deliver results in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and be dependable and reliable in meeting deadlines and targets.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Maintains and organizes key platforms like SharePoint, Asana, Trainual, and internal content hubs to ensure tea
mbers have reliable access to accurate, branded, and up-to-date resources.

- Creates polished slide decks, branded visuals, and instructional content that enhance both internal and external experiences, ensuring messaging is clear, consistent, and aligned with company standards.

- Serves as a cross-functional connector by capturing and refining processes, coordinating updates, and promoting best practices that streamline communication, reduce inefficiencies, and support scalable growth.





OBJECTIVES

- Maintain and update internal platforms such as SharePoint, Asana, Trainual, and the in-house LMS to ensure content is accurate, accessible, and aligned with business needs.

- Create and manage branded content including slide decks, templates, and instructional materials to support onboarding, internal communication, and cross-team initiatives.

- Transcribe and format content fro
etings or recorded walkthroughs into clear, structured documentation for reference and training.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure timely task completion, content updates, and accountability across platforms.





COMPETENCIES

- Strong business acumen with the ability to understand operational priorities and translate them into effective solutions.

- Thorough grasp of company principles, frameworks, and messaging, with the ability to translate them into clear, engaging training content and internal communications that reinforce alignment and learning.

- Proficiency in visual tools and process mapping software such as L
, Microsoft Visio, or similar platforms.

- Experience with project management tools (e.g., Asana) and productivity suites including G-Suite (Slides, Docs) and Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Word, Excel).

- Ability to produce clear, accurate documentation and visual content that simplifies complex information for diverse teams.

- High attention to detail, with a focus on quality control and consistency in branding, formatting, and content delivery.

- Skilled in creating standardized templates and assets that can be leveraged across the organization.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in administrative, operations, or content-focused roles.

- Prior experience supporting internal systems, content development, or process documentation in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment is a plus.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Creative Strategist/Copywriter for DTC Supplement Brand
description:
We've scaled multiple DTC brands past 7 figures/month. We're now hiring creative strategists for a new supplement brand in our portfolio.



This is a performance-driven role. You get a base retainer plus a percentage of the ad spend your work generates. Strong creative means strong income.



What the role looks like day to day:

You'll be writing direct response ad concepts and iterations for Meta ads. Every piece of creative is measured. You'll see exactly what your work does in-market and iterate based on real data, not guesswork.



This isn't "write copy and send it into a void."

You'll know what won, what lost, and why.



What we provide:

We have a thorough onboarding built around the consumer psychology, direct response frameworks, and structured workflows you'd need to write ads that actually scale. This isn't theory. These are the exact systems we've used to scale brands profitably, and you'll be trained on all of it.



You won't be guessing at what works. You'll have the frameworks, the data, and the feedback loop to get better fast.



What we're looking for:

You have a background in copywriting, creative strategy, or direct response advertising. You've written ads,
s, VSLs, landing pages, or scripts and you understand that the job is to move people to action, not just write things that sound good.



Beyond that:

You're comfortable working a consistent daily schedule, not juggling ten clients at once. You take feedback seriously and iterate fast. You care whether your work actually converts, not just whether it got approved.



Who this isn't for:

If you think good copy is about clever words rather than structured persuasion, this won't be a fit. If you're resistant to frameworks, systems, or direct feedback on your work, this isn't the right environment. If you want to write one thing, invoice, and disappear, this role will frustrate you.



Compensation:

Monthly base retainer, plus a percentage tied to ad spend on your creatives. Long-term, consistent workload with room to grow and be promoted as the brand scales.



To apply:

Send a brief message with:

Your relevant experience, what you've written, what space you've worked in, and what kind of results you've driven.



One or two examples of direct response copy you've written. Ads preferred, but
s, landing pages, or scripts work too.

title: Accounts Receivable Specialist
description:
Job Title: Accounts Receivable & Invoicing Specialist

Location: Remote (US Hours)



Schedule: Full-time | Sun-Fri 8AM-5PM PST 



About the Role



We’re looking for a detail-obsessed, process-driven Accounts Receivable Specialist to handle invoicing, payment tracking, and reconciliation across multiple systems.



You will be working with multiple tools, managing high-volume transactions and ensuring absolute accuracy in financial records.



What You’ll Be Doing



Invoicing & Sales Order Processing

Review completed sales orders

Input and generate invoices in QuickBooks with 100?curacy

Match shipping documents (BOL/POD) and ensure completeness before invoicing

Maintain and update Invoice Tracker in Google Sheets



Customer & Product Setup

Create new customer profiles in QuickBooks

Add new SKUs and ensure correct income/expense account mapping

Ensure proper currency handling (USD/EUR)



Payment Processing & Matching

Match payments from Maverick, Shopify, and bank feeds to invoices

Investigate discrepancies and resolve mismatches

Track payment batches and reconcile deposits accurately



Specialized Invoicing (Advanced)

Process dropship invoices 

Handle EU VAT scenarios and compliance requirements

Apply correct tax treatments depending on shipping and billing regions



Process Compliance & Documentation

Follow SOPs strictly and flag inconsistencies

Maintain organized documentation (SO, BOL, invoices)

Coordinate with Sales, Warehouse, and Finance teams



What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves:

2+ years experience in Accounts Receivable or Invoicing

Strong experience with QuickBooks

High proficiency in Google Sheets (XLOOKUP, filtering, reconciliation)

Experience handling high-volume transactions

Extreme attention to detail (non-negotiable)



Bonus Points If You Have:

Experience with ERP systems, Shopify, or Maverick Payments

Exposure to EU VAT rules or international invoicing

Experience with dropshipping or inventory-based businesses





How to Apply



Submit:



Your resume with the word "pineapple" included in your cover letter

hourly + commission

I look forward to connecting with you.

John

title: Part-Time Video Editor — Short-Form & Reels Content
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a creative and trend-savvy Part-Time Video Editor to transform our existing video library into high-impact short-form content for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels. We have 20–50 raw videos ready to go, and we need someone who can make them scroll-stopping, engaging, and shareable.

This is a flexible, remote position — perfect for a creative professional who lives and breathes social media trends and knows what it takes to hook an audience in the first three seconds.



What You'll Do

? Edit and repurpose existing raw footage into polished short-form Reels (15–90 seconds)

? Add trending audio, music, sound effects, and voiceovers to enhance engagement

? Incorporate on-screen text, captions, animated subtitles, and motion graphics

? Apply current social media trends — hooks, transitions, effects, pacing — to maximize reach

? Optimize each video for platform-specific formats (vertical 9:16, square, horizontal)

? Deliver a consistent volume of edited content on an agreed-upon schedule

? Stay up to date with trending sounds, visual styles, and content formats on each platform

? Collaborate on content strategy and provide creative input to improve performance



What We're Looking For

? Proven experience editing short-form social media video (Reels, Shorts, TikTok, etc.)

? Strong portfolio showcasing engaging, high-retention social content

? Proficiency in editing software such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

? Deep understanding of what makes content perform on YouTube, Instagram, and

? Eye for visual storytelling, pacing, color grading, and audio mixing

? Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage a content queue

? Strong communication skills and openness to feedback

title: SEO & Content Specialist
description:
Are you an SEO specialist who loves seeing your content climb the rankings? Do you get excited about keyword research, technical audits, and crafting content that actually converts?



Innovest, a leading financial advice company in New Zealand, is looking for an experienced SEO & Content Specialist to join our growing team. We help Kiwi families buy their first homes, protect their families with insurance, and build wealth through smart financial decisions. Now we need someone to help more people find us online.



What You'll Do:

• Develop and execute SEO strategies that drive organic traffic and leads

• Write engaging blog content and landing pages (4-8 articles/month)

• Conduct technical SEO audits and implement improvements

• Manage local SEO for Auckland and Hamilton regions

• Track performance and report on what's working (and what's not)

• Collaborate with our paid ads specialist to create a cohesive digital strategy



What We're Looking For:

• 3-5 years of SEO experience with proven results

• Excellent written English — you can write content that doesn't sound like AI

• Hands-on experience with Semrush, Ahrefs, or similar SEO tools

• Strong understanding of Google Analytics and Search Console

• WordPress experience

• Self-motivated — you don't need someone checking on you every hour



Nice to Have:

• Experience with financial services or professional services clients

• Familiarity with Australia/New Zealand markets

• Experience with Surfer SEO or similar content optimisation tools



What We Offer:

• Up to NZD$2,000.00 monthly (based on experience)

• Work from home — permanently

• Premium SEO tools provided (no using free trials!)

• Training and professional development budget

• Stable company (we've been around since 2006)

• Filipino colleagues already on the team — you won't be the only remote worker



To Apply:

Please submit:

1. Your CV/resume to 
 with subject line “SEO & Content Specialist – [YourName]”

2. A brief cover letter telling us about your SEO experience

3. Links to 2-3 content pieces you've written (blog posts, articles, etc.)

4. One example of SEO results you achieved (screenshots, ranking improvements, traffic growth)



We review applications as they come in — don't wait to apply!

title: Strategic Logistics Partner (For Current Amazon/Ecom VAs Only)
description:
Stop just being a data entry clerk and start being a Growth Partner.



We run a high-volume US-based 3PL and Prep Center. We are looking for a few "inside" partners to collaborate with. If you are currently handling the daily operations, sourcing, or shipments for your boss, we have a way for you to:



Add 6–10% immediate ROI to your client’s bottom line by optimizing their logistics and sourcing costs.



Earn a recurring incentive for being the one who brought the solution to the table.



We handle the heavy lifting (the warehouse, the labels, the shipping). You just show your boss the math and look like a hero for saving them thousands in "lost" margins.



This is a high-level logistical edge we are keeping low-key. We are only looking for VAs who actually care about their client's growth and want an extra stream of income for their expertise.



Interested? Message me with "PREP" and tell me a bit about the store you're currently managing.

/Instagram) ad campaigns focused on lead generation

mbers — not working solo

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
2026



 JOB OVERVIEW

Part-Time Social Media Content Creator

Are you a creative and motivated individual with a passion for social media? We're looking for a part-time Social Media Content Creator to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing a content strategy across our key platforms, including
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, with the primary goal of increasing customer engagement, driving traffic to our website, and boosting sales.

This role is highly focused on creating compelling and dynamic video content, so a strong background in video production and editing is a must. You will transform our existing video library, leverage AI tools (e.g. Invideo, Zeely, ChatGPT, etcand other assets into exciting and shareable content.

Key Responsibilities:

* Content Creation: Develop and produce engaging, on-brand content, with a strong emphasis on video formats. This includes creating daily posts that grab attention and encourage user interaction. This also includes editing and leveraging recent TV/radio segments and other assets.

* Video Editing: Use tools like CapCut to edit and optimize existing video footage for various platforms, ensuring each video is high-quality and tailored to its audience.

* Content Strategy: Integrate relevant news articles and trending topics into our content calendar to maintain a fresh and timely presence.

* Community Management: Actively monitor all social media channels, responding to comments and messages to foster a positive and engaging community.

* Scheduling and Publishing: Plan, create, and schedule all social media posts in advance to ensure a consistent and reliable content flow.

Qualifications:

* Proven experience in a social media management or content creation role.

* Demonstrated proficiency in video editing software, particularly CapCut and AI tools.

* Strong understanding of social media platforms and their unique content requirements 
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube).

* Excellent communication and writing skills.

* Creative mindset with the ability to turn ideas into visually compelling content.

* Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

This is a part-time position (approx 10 hrs weekly) with flexible hours. If you're a self-starter with a knack for creating content that converts, we'd love to hear from you!



Please send a recent video of yourself introducing who you are, sharing why you feel that you are the right person for this role and sharing successes that you have had as a social media content creator.

title: Licensed Physician (Telemedicine)
description:
About Us



We are a growing digital health company providing international telemedicine services, including remote medical consultations and issuance of medical documentation such as certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity. Our platform serves clients across Europe and other international markets, operating fully remotely under Philippine jurisdiction.





Role Overview



We are looking for part-time licensed Filipino physicians to join our telemedicine team. You will conduct remote patient consultations, evaluate symptoms, and issue valid medical certificates and documentation as part of our cross-border telemedicine platform. All work is performed entirely online. No in-person clinic visits required.





Key Responsibilities



- Conduct remote telemedicine consultations with international patients via our digital platform

- Evaluate patient-reported symptoms and medical history to determine appropriate medical documentation

- Issue medical certificates (certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity) in accordance with Philippine medical practice standards

- Maintain accurate and confidential patient records for each consultation

- Adhere to all applicable Philippine medical laws, telemedicine regulations, and company protocols

- Respond to consultations within agreed turnaround times (typically same-day)



Required Qualifications



Licensing and Registration (Mandatory)

- Active, valid PRC (Professional Regulation Commission) license as a Doctor of Medicine

- Registered and in good standing with the PRC under Republic Act No. 2382 (The Medical Act of 1959) and its amendments

- Must be able to provide PRC license picture and number, and board certification for verification

- Legally authorized to practice medicine in the Philippines, including issuing medical certificates as part of professional medical practice



Telemedicine Compliance

- Familiarity with or willingness to comply with DOH Administrative Order
(Guidelines on the Use of Telemedicine in Clinical Practice)

- Understanding that services are delivered under Philippine jurisdiction as cross-border telemedicine (WTO GATS Mode 1), and all medical documentation is issued under Philippine medical law



Education

- Doctor of Medicine (MD) degree from a Philippine medical school recognized by CHED (Commission on Higher Education)

- Passed the Philippine Physician Licensure Examination



Experience

- Minimum 1 year of clinical practice (hospital, clinic, or telemedicine setting)

- Prior telemedicine preferred



Work Arrangement



- Part-time, flexible hours. Work on your own schedule within agreed availability windows

- Fully remote. Work from anywhere in the Philippines, provided your PRC license remains active and valid

- Expected workload is 5-10 hours per week, scalable based on demand





Compensation



- Competitive fixed monthly salary based on your availability

- Payment processed monthly via local bank transfer in PHP currency (equivalent to USD $200-$400/month)

- Performance bonuses for consistent quality and turnaround time





How to Apply



Please submit the following:



- Updated CV or Resume highlighting your medical experience

- PRC License Number (will be verified)

- Copy of valid PRC ID or License (digital scan)

- Board certification details (if applicable)

- Brief cover letter explaining your interest in telemedicine and availability



Put PHDOC in your application title so we know you have read this job post. If it is not added, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Creative Designer (Video + Static)
description:
We’re looking for a high-level, self-driven creative designer to produce video and static content for a fast-growing 12V automotive brand.



Switch Boss is a premium 12V automotive brand based in Brisbane, Australia.

We design and supply high-quality switches and accessories used in:

- 4WD builds

- caravans

- marine setups

- trade and DIY installs



We are growing fast across retail and trade and focus on:

- clean installs

- premium design

- practical, real-world use



This is not a “follow instructions” role.

We need someone who:

- can take a direction and run with it

- produces content without being chased

- improves over time, not repeats the same work

- understands that content exists to drive performance, not just look good



What You’ll Be Doing

- Edit and produce short-form video content (ads + organic)

- Create high-converting static creatives (ads,
s, social)

- Turn raw footage into multiple variations and angles

- Continuously create new creatives from existing content

- Work from briefs provided by the marketing team

- Suggest improvements and new creative directions

- Stay up to date with trends, tools, and AI-based workflows



What We Expect

You are:

- Self-reliant – you don’t wait to be told what to do

- Proactive – if there’s no task, you create one

- Detail-focused – small things matter

- Open to feedback – and can improve quickly

- Performance-minded – you understand content must convert



What Success Looks Like

- You consistently deliver high-quality creatives on time

- You generate variations without being asked

- Your work improves week-to-week

- You take ownership of output, not just tasks



Tools (Not Mandatory, but Preferred)

- Adobe Suite / Premiere Pro / After Effects

- Canva (for speed where needed)

- CapCut or similar for fast editing

- Experience using AI tools in design workflows



Application Instructions (Important)

To apply,
 your portfolio and:

- Include “Tiger – Creative Role” in the subject line

- Include 3 examples of your best performing work and explain why they worked

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

mber, and present monthly quality reports to leadership.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Appointment Setter (100% Remote)



About Us

SG Services is a fast-growing B2B sales development and lead generation company based in Arlington, VA. Since 2019, we have helped clients across SaaS, private equity, energy, e-commerce, and other industries by booking qualified sales meetings and driving consistent pipeline growth.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Instagram Growth Specialist
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a technically sharp Instagram specialist who understands what it takes to grow accounts properly — not just posting, but understanding device management, account health, content strategy, and engagement. This isn't a beginner role. You should be genuinely good at social media, have strong opinions on what content works and why, and take ownership of every account you manage.

Key Responsibilities



**PAY RANGE: $750-$1,200**



Manage and grow clients' Instagram accounts through consistent, strategic posting and engagement.

Understand and execute device management protocols — isolating accounts, managing device fingerprints, and maintaining account integrity across multiple accounts.

Warm up new accounts properly, building trust through natural, human engagement patterns before pushing content.

Edit and post Reels and content that performs, understanding what drives traffic and conversions versus what just gets empty views.

Have a genuine understanding of content strategy — know what's trending, what formats work, and actively contribute ideas on what to post and when.

Perform daily engagement tasks — interacting with target audiences using natural, human patterns to keep accounts looking real and active.

Monitor account health daily, run regular checks, and know how to respond when reach drops or accounts are flagged.

Troubleshoot account issues confidently — understanding what went wrong, why, and how to recover.



Technical Requirements



Must have at least one dedicated work phone, minimum iPhone XR, ideally iPhone 11 or newer. This phone must be used solely for work.



Requirements



Experience managing and growing Instagram accounts for brands, businesses, or clients.

Strong understanding of how the Instagram algorithm works, what triggers flags, and how to stay visible.

Genuinely passionate about social media — you're plugged into trends and understand content at a deeper level than just scheduling posts.

Consistent and reliable with strong attention to detail.



KPIs



Account Health (% of accounts staying active and unflagged)

Follower Growth

Traffic Volume (Link Clicks per day)

title: SEO / SEM Specialist
description:
Full time career opportunity – diverse B2B/B2C Digital Sales & Marketing role in consumer products – growing responsibilities

A great long term career opportunity awaits a driven, agile, digital-savvy, hungry-to-learn individual who wants to take on growing responsibilities in using AI to drive digital sales and marketing for two exciting Australian consumer brands.

I own two established consumer brands (both have been around for over 50 years), historically operating in the wholesale space (800+ stockists). Over the last couple of years, the B2C channel has grown in importance and its simply too much workload for me to manage. 

Your workload would consist of 2-3 hours per day of digital development work (enhancing websites functionalities and SEO improvements) another 1-2 hour on digital marketing initiatives (from EDMs to SEM) and the remainder on managing marketplace offerings and promotions.  You will implement digital support projects (eg editing product images in Canva, generating AI images for digital ads, managing & optimising google ads, updating online marketplace listings on eBay, Iconic, Faire, Fieldfolio, Fruugo, Amazon) as well as responding to social media posts and posting pro-actively on social media (less than 2 hours per week). You are expected to explore how to use AI tools to make this work more efficient. 

You already have experience in Digital Sales Support, consider yourself a fast learner and self-starter who is willing to take on additional responsibilities to support all sales activity through all our digital sales channels. You have a can-do attitude and are comfortable handling multiple tasks simultaneously.

Advanced Microsoft office experience is required, including having previously managed websites and online marketplaces such as eBay and Amazon. You have significant experience using Shopify and Ahrefs and have a good working knowledge with Canva and AI image generation. You have capability to manage SEO and Google Ads, are an expert in building backlinks, improving keywords and have some experience with AI tools such as Claude Cowork, Gemini and are keen to trial new tools in this space. You have experience managing marketplace sales such as Amazon and are driven by improving sales. Some website development experience would also be beneficial. Any challenges you face that are not defined by our procedures, you are willing to research yourself (eg youtube videos) to figure out how to do something. 

The role is fulltime with salary increases over time in line with increased responsibilities. Hours are Monday to Friday and we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. Once you complete your 6 months’ probation, you are eligible for a 13th month salary.

This is a fantastic full-time career opportunity and the owner of the business is willing to invest a lot of time into your development. As such, if you are only after a short-term contract or prefer to continue doing some gig-work on the side, this role is not for you.

title: E-commerce Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a data scraping specialist who understands how to collect, organize, and maintain useful data from e-commerce platforms.



This role is focused on gathering product, pricing, competitor, seller, and marketplace data from platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and other online selling channels. You should be comfortable working with structured data, handling large product catalogs, and delivering accurate, clean outputs that can support business decisions.



What you’ll handle



Collect product, pricing, seller, review, and competitor data from Shopee, Lazada, and other e-commerce platforms

Extract and organize data in a clear and usable format

Monitor changes in listings, pricing, stock, promotions, and marketplace activity

Build and maintain scraping workflows for recurring data collection

Clean, structure, and validate data before delivery

Work with our team to improve data quality, speed, and reliability over time



What we want



Strong experience with data scraping and web data collection

Experience scraping e-commerce or marketplace platforms

Good knowledge of Python and scraping / automation frameworks

Must know how to use Claude Code and work with it effectively

Comfortable using developer tools needed for data scraping and automation

Ability to deliver clean, accurate, and well-structured datasets

Understanding of product pages, seller listings, reviews, pricing, and marketplace data points

Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully

Reliable communication and consistent delivery



Tools you should know



Python

Scrapy

Playwright, Selenium, or Puppeteer

BeautifulSoup

APIs and JSON data handling

Git and GitHub

Claude Code

Browser developer tools

CSV, Excel, or Google Sheets

Databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite

Basic proxy and session management is a plus

Docker or server deployment knowledge is a plus



How to apply



Send:

“Data Pro”

one direct portfolio link

to your best scraping, automation, or data extraction work



Accepted platforms:

GitHub, Upwork, personal portfolio, or case study links



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us



We are an e-commerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

title: Sales Logistics Coordinator
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Shipping Sales & Booking Coordinator to manage the full commercial and operational cycle of international shipments from the Far East to the USA. This hybrid role requires a mix of active sales/customer acquisition and hands-on shipment coordination.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Growth: Prospect, qualify, and onboard new customers while managing existing accounts.

Quoting & Closing: Prepare freight quotes (FCL, LCL, Air) and negotiate rates to close deals profitably.

Operations: Convert closed deals into bookings and coordinate shipments with overseas agents and carriers.

Documentation: Handle BL instructions, ISF, AMS, invoices, and packing lists.

Tracking: Proactively track shipments and resolve any logistical delays.



Required Qualifications

Experience: 3+ years in international freight forwarding or logistics.

Expertise: Proven experience specifically with Far East to USA shipping routes.

Technical Knowledge: Strong understanding of ocean freight (FCL/LCL), Incoterms, and U.S. import regulations (ISF, AMS).

Sales Ability: Demonstrated success in closing freight sales independently.

Systems: Familiarity with CRM and TMS platforms.

Personal Qualities: Entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership. Highly organized, customer-focused, and comfortable working independently.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a social media manager with deep, top-to-bottom understanding or experience across multiple platforms — Instagram and
 are non-negotiable. You need to understand everything from content editing and brand strategy down to account management and performance tracking. This role sits at the centre of our content operations: you'll be building platform-specific strategies, creating content briefs for clients, managing a team of VAs executing the work, and critically, understanding whether what you're doing is actually getting results. If you can't connect social media activity to measurable outcomes, this isn't the right fit.



*PAY RANGE: $950-$2,000+**



Key Responsibilities



Build and own content strategies tailored to each client across Instagram,
, and other platforms, understanding that what works on one doesn't work on another.

Edit content for social media or direct the editing process — you know what performs and how content should look before it goes out.

Create detailed content briefs to send to clients so they know exactly what to produce and how.

Manage a team of social media VAs, ensuring they're executing the strategy correctly and consistently.

Create and maintain posting schedules and content calendars, specifying formats, timing, and platform-specific best practices.

Analyse content performance across platforms and pivot strategy based on what's actually working for each specific client, not just general trends.

Understand whether social media activity is translating into results — tracking funnels, links, and conversions so you're never working in a vacuum.

Monitor account health across all managed accounts and understand the technical side of keeping accounts safe and visible.

Identify creative bottlenecks with clients and find alternative content formats that still deliver results.



Requirements



Proven experience in social media management for brands, businesses, or clients, with deep knowledge of Instagram and
 at minimum.

Full-range understanding of social media marketing — from content creation and editing through to strategy, scheduling, and performance analysis.

Experience managing or overseeing a team of VAs.

Strong understanding of funnels, tracking links, and how social media activity connects to measurable business results.

Understanding of account health monitoring and managing multiple accounts.

Detail-oriented — you don't just say "post more," you provide the strategy, the content brief, and the reasoning behind it.



KPIs



Cross-Platform Growth (Followers, Impressions, Reach)

Traffic & Conversion (Link Clicks, Funnel Performance)

Content Performance (Engagement Rates, Post Quality)

Team Execution (VA output quality and consistency)

title: Video Editor (Motion Graphics Specialist)
description:
Do you have experience editing high-performing videos, adding engaging motion graphics, and want a stable, long-term role where your creativity actually matters?



Then you’re in the right place.



We’re looking for a Video Editor who is skilled in motion graphics and can bring ideas to life across ads, YouTube videos, and short-form content.



This is not just a basic editing role, we want someone who understands pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement, and can elevate content beyond simple cuts.



A full SOP will be provided. You won’t be guessing, we just need your editing skills and creativity to execute (and improve) proven content formats.



THE ROLE:



You will be responsible for editing videos across multiple formats including ads, YouTube content, and short-form videos.



We’ll provide:



- Raw footage and assets

- Clear instructions and creative direction

- Examples of the style we’re aiming for

- A step-by-step SOP



Your job is to take these inputs and turn them into polished, engaging videos with strong motion graphics, smooth pacing, and high-quality visuals.



You should be able to follow direction while also adding your own creative touch to improve the final output.



You’ll work with a team where each role supports the others, so communication and collaboration are key.



EXPERIENCE & SKILLS:



- Minimum 1 year of video editing experience

- Proficient in professional editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro or equivalent)

- Strong motion graphics skills (After Effects or similar tools)

- Experience editing ads, YouTube videos, and short-form content

- Ability to follow instructions while still being creative (we don’t want robots)

- Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual flow

- Team player who communicates well and collaborates effectively

- Detail-oriented and reliable

- Good English and comfortable communicating online



PAY & HOURS:



Salary: $1500 per month

Days: Monday to Friday

Hours: 8 hours per day



If you’re interested, please include the word “MOTION” in your application so we know you’ve read everything.



Also send examples of your past work, especially videos that include motion graphics.



Start date: ASAP



Looking forward to your application.

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant - Nomad Cruise
description:
Join the team behind Nomad Cruise, a floating conference that brings 300+ digital nomads together for community, learning, and adventure across the world's oceans.



About Nomad Cruise

Nomad Cruise is more than an event - it's a global community. We host immersive cruises that combine inspiring talks, workshops, and unforgettable on-shore adventures, creating deep connections between remote professionals from all over the world. Our core values are community, adventure, and inspiration, and everything we do is designed to reflect them.



The Role

We're looking for a Social Media VA who genuinely enjoys the craft of social media- someone who understands tone, and keeps things consistent. You'll be the voice behind our channels day-to-day, helping us stay active, engaged, and on-brand.

Your work will reach thousands of nomads around the world and directly shape how they experience the Nomad Cruise community online.



What You'll Do



Video & Content Editing

Edit short-form video content (Reels, Stories, clips) and assist with graphics or visual assets — taking raw material from the team and turning it into polished, publish-ready content.



Community Management

Respond to comments, DMs, and mentions across Instagram and other platforms — keeping our community warm, active, and engaged in a tone that feels human and on-brand.



Content Scheduling & Coordination

Help plan and schedule posts using our content calendar, coordinating with the team to keep channels consistent and active.



Caption Writing & Ideation

Write captions, suggest content ideas, and repurpose existing material to keep our feeds fresh and our voice consistent.





The Details:

Based in Manila, Philippines

Part-time, remote

5–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule

Long-term opportunity - with the right fit, we're looking for someone to grow with us



Why You'll Love It



Work with a globally minded, purpose-driven team

Your content reaches nomads and travellers worldwide

Fully remote and flexible schedule

Gain behind-the-scenes insight into a unique international event and community



This Role Is For You If You're…



Based in Manila, Philippines

A natural communicator with a friendly, professional tone

Organised and consistent — you don't let things slip

Experienced with short-form video editing (Reels, CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Familiar with Instagram,
, and basic scheduling tools

Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

Proactive - you flag issues and bring ideas without being asked



How to Apply

Please complete our short application form to get started. As part of your application, include a media kit or portfolio with examples of your work - edited videos or Reels, accounts you've managed, or content you've created.

We'll also ask you to record a short 1-minute video telling us what excites you about this role. No need for perfection - we just want to get a sense of who you are.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Looking forward to hearing from you,

Emilia 

Project & Partnership Manager, Nomad Cruise

title: Video Upscaling Assistant (Topaz AI)
description:
Hello!



We are looking for a reliable assistant to handle video upscaling using Topaz AI. We have an active subscription and have already tested the workflow—your role will be to upload videos, apply the required model and settings, and export the final output.



Responsibilities:



1. Upload provided videos into Topaz AI

2. Apply specified upscaling settings

3. Export and monitor rendering until completion

4. Upload the now upscaled video on google drive or dropbox (storage already provided by us)



Requirements (PC Specs):



1. Dedicated GPU (NVIDIA RTX series preferred, e.g., RTX 3060 or higher)

2. Minimum 16GB RAM (32GB recommended for smoother performance)

3. Modern multi-core CPU (Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 or better)

4. SSD storage for faster processing and file handling

5. Stable system capable of running long render sessions (3–5 hours per video)

6. Reliable internet connection (preferably 500mbps or higher) 



Compensation:



$5 per video

Approximately 3 videos per week (can be increase)



This is a simple, plug-and-play process with clear instructions provided. If you're interested and have the required setup, let us know—we’d love to work with you.

title: B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist
description:
B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist

Full-Time

$600 / month

$800 after 3 months



About Us

Trustyfy is a global technology company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time since the invention of modern banking, customers, not banks, can have full ownership of their money.

Through our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized infrastructure, businesses can operate globally without payment delays and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banking systems. Workers can remit funds to their families with minimal fees, and billions of unbanked individuals gain access to financial independence.

We are not just building the future of finance. We are building technology that creates real-world impact.

Our vision is validated through strong recurring revenue and a successful seed round, and we are now scaling our global team to support the next phase of growth.

Why Your Role Matters

As a B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist, you will help business clients confidently navigate crypto transactions and blockchain workflows. Your ability to combine excellent customer service with technical accuracy will ensure clients can securely send, receive, and verify digital funds while trusting Trustyfy’s infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

Provide exceptional support to users and business clients via
, chat, and phone, ensuring prompt and accurate issue resolution.





Educate and guide users on interacting with decentralized applications (DApps) and using crypto wallets securely, including tools such as MetaMask.





Assist clients with sending, receiving, and verifying crypto transactions, including transaction validation using explorers such as Etherscan.





Troubleshoot issues related to blockchain networks, wallet integrations, and decentralized applications.





Collaborate with technical and product teams to escalate and resolve complex cases.





Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, technical concerns, and service recommendations.

Skills and Experience

Experience: Minimum of 2 years in customer service, technical support, or client success, ideally within fintech, Web3, or blockchain environments.





Technical Knowledge: Familiarity with crypto wallets, blockchain transactions, and DApps. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new Web3 tools.





Customer Service Skills: Strong communication, empathy, and client-focused problem-solving abilities.





Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts.





Problem Solving: Strong troubleshooting and analytical thinking skills with high attention to detail.





Work Ethic: Highly reliable, self-motivated, and capable of working independently in a remote environment.





Availability:

Schedule Options: UK, US or AUS timezones

Must be open to working on weekends

40 hours per week, 5 working days



Salary

YOUR PAYMENT IS FIXED AND GUARANTEED. This means you will be paid even if workload temporarily fluctuates (although consistent workload is expected).



To apply for this position, please write in the subject line:

“I am a B2B Crypto Customer Support Specialist [Name + Surname]”

title: Customer Service Representative (Voice Only | Remote | Philippines) US-Based Company | Long-Term Role | Full-Time
description:
Read This Before You Apply

This role is 100% voice-based. Every shift, you will be on the phone handling outbound and/or inbound calls for US clients. If you are looking for a chat,
, or non-voice position, this is not the role for you. We are only interested in hearing from serious, long-term candidates who are fully committed to a professional voice career.

Applications submitted without a voice recording will be automatically rejected no exceptions.



About the Role

We are a US-based company building a reliable, high-performing remote team in the Philippines. We are looking for Customer Service Representatives who are ready to grow with us for the long haul. This is a permanent, full-time position we are not hiring for temporary projects or part-time arrangements.

As a CSR, you will serve as the direct voice of our company to US customers and clients. You will handle live calls throughout your entire shift whether outbound, inbound, or both depending on account assignments. You must be comfortable being on the phone consistently, without extended breaks from calls.



Key Responsibilities

Handle outbound and/or inbound calls professionally and courteously throughout every shift

Communicate clearly and confidently with English-speaking US clients and customers

Follow call scripts, workflows, and account-specific guidelines

Accurately document call outcomes and customer information

Consistently meet performance benchmarks and attendance standards

Adapt to different accounts and campaign types as business needs evolve





Schedule

Shifts are aligned to US time zones (Eastern, Central, Mountain, or Pacific)

Expect to work afternoon to overnight Philippine time

Exact days and hours depend on client and account assignment

Schedule flexibility is a strong advantage accounts may rotate



Training & Onboarding

Paid training provided before going live

Full support throughout onboarding to set you up for success

First 30 days is a probationary period

Salary increases available after probation based on performance and attendance



Who We're Looking For

We want people who are in this for the long term agents who show up, perform consistently, and grow with the company as new accounts open. If you have a history of job-hopping, inconsistent attendance, or are looking for temporary income, please do not apply.



Requirements:

Fluent, clear spoken and written English non-negotiable

Proven ability to handle high volumes of live phone calls

Reliable, stable internet connection (wired connection strongly preferred)

Computer running Windows 11 Pro

Noise-cancelling headset

Quiet, dedicated home workspace suitable for professional calls — free from background noise and interruptions

Ability to commit fully to a US-hour night shift on a long-term basis

Strong attendance record and professional work ethic

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently without supervision



Compensation

Starting salary: ?26,500/month, paid bi-weekly

Salary increase opportunities after the 30-day probation period based on productivity and attendance

Room to grow as additional accounts become available





How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit both of the following:



Your CV/Resume

A voice recording introducing yourself and demonstrating your spoken English communication skills



Applications missing either the CV or the voice recording will not be reviewed no exceptions.

In your voice recording, briefly introduce yourself, describe your call center or customer service experience.

We are hiring selectively. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



If you are reliable, professional, and serious about building a long-term remote career in voice-based customer service we want to hear from you.

title: OUTBOUND CAMPAIGN OPERATOR — COLD EMAIL & DELIVERABILITY
description:
OUTBOUND CAMPAIGN OPERATOR — COLD
 & DELIVERABILITY



**Please read requirements carefully before applying**



Lead Searchers is a specialist outbound growth firm helping UK service companies generate high-value commercial opportunities through targeted cold
 campaigns.



We work primarily with UK B2B service industries, helping them secure early conversations with decision-makers.



Our campaigns are built to generate real revenue conversations while protecting domain reputation and long-term deliverability.



We are now hiring an Outbound Campaign Operator to own campaign execution and performance.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is not a support role.



You will be responsible for running outbound cold
 campaigns end-to-end, from data through to booked meetings.



Your role is to ensure campaigns are well targeted, technically sound, and continuously improving.



Over time, the goal is for you to fully own the operational side of outbound, allowing the founder to focus on sales and growth.



You will be expected to identify issues, suggest improvements, and take responsibility for results.



CORE SKILLS

Cold
 Campaign Management

Data Cleaning & Lead List Building

 Deliverability / Inbox Management



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Ownership

Run multiple outbound campaigns (typically 3–5 clients)

Execute campaigns from brief through to live performance

Maintain consistency, quality, and reliability



DATA & TARGETING

Build and refine highly targeted prospect lists

Ensure accuracy of:

- job titles

- company names

- geography

Remove duplicates and irrelevant contacts

Maintain clean, structured datasets at all times



DELIVERABILITY & DOMAIN HEALTH (CRITICAL)

Identify and resolve deliverability issues early

Diagnose and resolve inbox placement issues (spam vs primary)

Manage warmup, sending volumes, and inbox rotation

Ensure strong inbox placement and avoid spam risks



CAMPAIGN SETUP & MANAGEMENT

Set up campaigns in Smartlead or Instantly

Manage sending schedules and inbox distribution

Monitor campaign performance and make adjustments



TESTING & OPTIMISATION

Run A/B tests on subject lines and messaging

Analyse open, reply, and positive response rates

Identify improvements and implement changes



REPLY HANDLING & QUALIFICATION

Categorise responses accurately

SYSTEMS & REPORTING

TOOLS

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

 verification tools

Google Sheets / data management



Bonus:

Clay

Advanced deliverability tools



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong understanding of cold
 campaign mechanics

Experience managing outbound campaigns end-to-end

High attention to detail, especially with data

Ability to work independently and take ownership

Comfortable identifying and solving problems

Awareness of deliverability and domain health



THIS ROLE IS NOT

A basic VA position

A copywriting role

A task-only execution role

Not suitable for candidates who require constant instruction or supervision



You will be expected to think, improve, and take responsibility for outcomes.



STRUCTURE

Remote

Initially part-time

Flexible hours

Opportunity to grow into a long-term operator role



COMPENSATION

HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



Your experience managing cold
 campaigns

What you personally owned in that campaign



SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL COMPLETE A PAID TEST TASK.

title: Brand Protection Specialist (DMCA)
description:
Who We Are



Mira Organics is a fast-growing health and wellness eCommerce brand that scaled from zero to seven figures in just two months. We sell a nerve relief lotion designed for people aged 50 and above living with neuropathy and we are genuinely making a difference in people's lives every day.

We move fast. We build systems. We protect what we build.

As we scale we are seeing copycat stores, unauthorized listings, and content theft appear across multiple platforms. We need someone who knows exactly how to find and eliminate them without us having to explain the process.



The Purpose of This Role



Your job is simple, protect the Mira Organics brand online.

You will monitor the internet for unauthorized use of our brand, products, images, copy, and content. When you find something that should not be there you will take action to get it removed through DMCA claims, platform takedown requests, or direct outreach, using an authorization letter from the Company to act on our behalf.

This is a role where your expertise leads the way. You will be given full authorization to act on behalf of Mira Organics and we trust you to own the process end to end.



What You Will Do

Monitor the following platforms regularly for brand violations, copycat stores, unauthorized listings, and stolen content:

 and Instagram — ads, pages, and posts using our brand without authorization

TikTok — videos, ads, and accounts misusing our brand or product

Google — search results, websites, and landing pages copying our content

YouTube — videos using our footage, copy, or brand without permission

Forums and community sites — Reddit, Quora, and similar platforms

eCommerce platforms — Shopify storefronts and similar DTC sites (Alibaba, Aliexpress, Frugoo, Ebay etc)

Amazon — a quick weekly scan for copycat listings or unauthorized brand use. Anything flagged gets passed to the team right away. A small but valuable layer of protection that keeps us covered across every channel.



Take action on violations by:



Filing DMCA takedown requests on behalf of Mira Organics

Submitting platform-specific IP infringement reports

Removing unauthorized listings from eCommerce platforms

Contacting website owners and hosting providers for content removal

Documenting all violations and actions taken in a clear tracking sheet

Maintain a weekly brand protection report covering what was found, what was actioned, and what is still pending.



What We Are Looking For



Required Experience:

Proven experience filing DMCA takedown requests and IP infringement reports

Hands-on experience removing content from
, TikTok, YouTube, Google, and similar platforms

Experience identifying and reporting copycat stores and unauthorized eCommerce listings

Familiarity with platform-specific IP enforcement tools and processes

Strong written English for drafting takedown notices and correspondence



Character Traits We Hire For:



You are proactive — you find problems before they are reported to you

You are thorough — you do not stop at one platform when something is flagged

You are organized — you track every violation and every action taken

You are autonomous — we will give you the authorization letter and you will take it from there

You take ownership — this is your area and you run it



This Is NOT For You If:



You need step-by-step instructions on how takedowns work

You have never filed a DMCA claim or platform IP report before

You are unfamiliar with how copycat stores operate online

You are not comfortable working independently without close supervision



Hours and Location



Fully remote

Work from anywhere. 

Flexible hours 

We care about results, not your clock. Part-time to start with potential to grow as the brand scales.



How to Apply



To confirm you have read the full post please include the following in your application message:

Your resume

2 to 3 examples of successful takedowns or brand protection actions you have handled platform, type of violation, and outcome

Your salary expectations

This role is critical in ensuring the accuracy of our financial records and supporting the day-to-day financial operations of the business.

Monitor project costs, budgets, and cash flow

Assist with financial reporting, forecasting, and budgeting

Ensure compliance with all relevant Australian financial regulations and standards

Support internal processes to improve financial efficiency and accuracy



Requirements:



Proven experience as an Accountant, preferably within the construction industry

Experience handling day-to-day accounting operations independently

High level of accuracy, attention to detail, and reliability

Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., Xero, MYOB, or similar) and Microsoft Excel

Strong organizational and time management skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Application Instructions:

To be considered for this role, applicants must submit the following:



A copy of your updated resume

Your portfolio (if applicable)

Your hourly rate in AUD



Important: Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be entertained.



We are looking for a candidate who can start immediately and become a dependable part of our team, ensuring our financial operations run smoothly and efficiently.

*
 (Klaviyo)**
